1507300035.english: All the enemies on this side have been defeated. Black Lilith, how about over there?
1507300035.korean: 이쪽의 적은 전부 쓰러졌어요.&n리리스, 그쪽은 어떻죠?

1507300037.english: Black Lilith approached the T-1 Goblin at a very fast speed.
1507300037.korean: - 리리스는 멀리 떨어져 있는 T-1 고블린에게 매우 빠른 속도로 다가갔다.

1507300038.english: The infantry goblin fired to prevent her from approaching, and Black Lilith elegantly dodged all the bullets with minimal movement.
1507300038.korean: - 보병 고블린은 접근을 막기 위해 사격을 가했고, 리리스는 최소한의 움직임으로 우아하게 총알을 모두 피했다.

1507300039.english: But then, an artillery goblin hiding behind the wall fired a cannon at the ground where Black Lilith was.
1507300039.korean: - 하지만 그때 벽 뒤에 숨어 있던 포병 고블린이 리리스가 있는 지면을 향해 포를 발사했다.

1507300043.english: Black Lilith, having deployed Rosa Azule, was unharmed without a single scratch, and the remaining goblins also collapsed with the sound of gunshots.
1507300043.korean: - 로자 아쥴을 전개한 리리스는 긁힌 상처 하나 없이 멀쩡했고, 남은 고블린 역시 총소리와 함께 쓰러졌다.

1507300051.english: - According to Cardinal Armand's prediction, the portal will open within the next 18 hours.
1507300051.korean: - 아르망의 예측으로는 앞으로 18시간 이내에 포탈이 열리게 될 거야.

1507300053.english: This is fine. Good job, Black Lilith.

1507400013.english: T-14 Miho, don't you have a funny story?

1507400041.english: … T-60 Bulgasari, please clear a path for your teammates to enter. If there are any doors that do not open, destroying them is also permitted.
1507400041.korean: …불가사리는 팀원이 진입할 수 있도록 길을 열어주세요.&n열리지 않는 문이 있다면 파괴도 허가합니다.

1507400043.english: T-14 Miho asks you to eliminate the enemies from the rear. As you know, they are no longer bioroids. Do not hesitate.
1507400043.korean: 미호는 후방에서 적들의 제거를 부탁합니다.&n알고 있겠지만 저들은 더 이상 바이오로이드가 아닙니다. 망설이지 마세요.

1507400045.english: Finally, P-24 Pinto, please handle reconnaissance, securing vision, and disrupting the enemies.
1507400045.korean: 마지막으로 핀토는 정찰 및 시야 확보, 적들의 교란을 부탁합니다.

1507400049.english: Ah! That's unfair! You only petted P-24 Pinto! Mom, me too!
1507400049.korean: 아앗! 치사해! 핀토만 쓰다듬어 주고!&n엄마 저도요!

1507500048.english: Prototype Labiata, please break through to the marked point along with the other suppression team members.
1507500048.korean: 라비아타는 다른 제압조 대원과 함께 표시한 지점까지 돌파를 부탁해.

1507500050.english: Alpha and Black Lilith, please come with me.

1507600014.english: At my words, Black Lilith slowly lowered her gun, but she did not stop glaring at Omega with a warning look that she would not let him get away with any foolishness.
1507600014.korean: - 내 말에 리리스는 천천히 총구를 거두었지만, 허튼수작하면 가만두지 않겠다는 경고의 눈빛으로 오메가를 노려보는 건 멈추지 않았다.

1507600050.english: Black Lilith, put the gun away.

1507700026.english: They attempted to break through by force, but even with Prototype Labiata's power, it was impossible to destroy it, leaving only minor scratches.
1507700026.korean: - 무력으로 돌파를 시도했지만, 라비아타의 힘으로도 미세한 상처만 남길 뿐 파괴하기에는 무리였다.

1507800028.english: Feeling a sense of foreboding at her unusual behavior, I followed Black Lilith.
1507800028.korean: - 평소와는 다른 모습에 나는 불길함을 느끼며 리리스를 따라갔다.

1507900030.english: At my shout, Prototype Labiata and Black Lilith took the lead, and Omega and I ran toward Zeta under the covering fire and escort of the other suppression squad members.
1507900030.korean: - 나의 외침에 라비아타와 리리스가 앞장섰고, 다른 제압조 대원들의 지원 사격과 호위를 받으며 나와 오메가는 제타에게 달려 나갔다.

1507900038.english: I reached out my hand toward Black Lilith, who was running toward me.
1507900038.korean: - 나는 달려오고 있는 리리스를 향해 손을 뻗었다.

1508300022.english: I know very well how much Miss Black Lilith is worried about you, Master.
1508300022.korean: 리리스 양이 얼마나 주인님을 걱정하고 있는지는 잘 알고 있어요.

1508300024.english: Until then, let's try trusting both Lady Prototype Labiata and Omega.
1508300024.korean: 그때까지는 라비아타 님과 오메가 두 사람을 믿어 보기로 해요.

1508400051.english: Prototype Labiata Prototype… A troublesome target has appeared here.
1508400051.korean: 라비아타 프로토타입… 귀찮은 대상이 여기서 나타났군요.

1508400076.english: I'm fine. It was good timing, Prototype Labiata.
1508400076.korean: 난 괜찮아. 좋은 타이밍이 와줬어 라비아타.

1508600005.english: Even if we have the Prototype Labiata Prototype, said to be the strongest bioroid, it is clear that we have the upper hand in the battle.
1508600005.korean: 최강의 바이오로이드라 일컬어지는 라비아타 프로토타입이 있다고 한들, 전황은 이쪽이 우위임이 명백한데.

1508600008.english: We could defeat Zeta if we could just create an opening now... but including myself, Prototype Labiata and Omega have practically reached our limit.
1508600008.korean: - 이제 틈만 만들 수 있다면 제타를 쓰러트릴 수 있지만… 나를 포함해서 라비아타와 오메가 두 사람도 사실상 한계야.

1508600013.english: - Prototype Labiata pointed to the black hole in the sky, and Zeta's Kestos Himas emitted light.
1508600013.korean: - 라비아타가 하늘에 뚫린 검은 구멍을 가리켰고, 제타의 케스토스 히마스가 빛을 내뿜었다.

1508600022.english: As soon as Zeta saw Black Lilith who had come through the portal, he swung his four tentacles and attacked.
1508600022.korean: - 제타는 포탈을 통해 넘어온 리리스를 보자마자 네 개의 촉수를 휘둘러 공격했다.

1508600024.english: Just before touching the approaching tentacles, Black Lilith deployed Rosa Azule in mid-air, and using it as a stepping stone, changed her trajectory in mid-air and rapidly approached Zeta.
1508600024.korean: - 리리스는 다가온 촉수에 닿기 직전 공중에서 로자 아쥴을 전개했고, 그걸 발판 삼아 공중에서 궤도를 바꾸어 제타에게 빠르게 접근했다.

1508600031.english: However, Prototype Labiata, who hadn't missed a single move, ran up and cut down the goblins blocking her path with a single stroke before I could even give an order.
1508600031.korean: - 하지만 나의 행동을 놓치지 않았던 라비아타는, 내가 지시하기도 전에 달려와 가로막은 고블린들을 단칼에 베어 넘겼다.

1508600040.english: Prototype Labiata and Black Lilith destroyed Zeta's weapons to put him in a completely subdued state, just in case.
1508600040.korean: - 라비아타와 리리스는 혹시 모를 상황을 대비해, 제타의 무장을 파괴하여 완전 제압 상태로 만들었다.

1508600058.english: I nodded at Prototype Labiata's words and stood up from my seat to return.
1508600058.korean: - 라비아타의 말에 나는 고개를 끄덕였고 돌아가기 위해 자리에서 일어섰다.

1508600078.english: Thank you so much for coming, Black Lilith.

1508700003.english: Immediately after I shouted for the last time, Prototype Labiata and Black Lilith blocked my path, and Omega, who was nearby, pushed me aside to protect me.
1508700003.korean: - 내가 마지막으로 외친 직후, 라비아타와 리리스는 내 앞을 가로막았고, 근처에 있던 오메가는 나를 몸으로 밀쳐 보호해 주었다.

1508700007.english: And soon, I was able to find the two people, Prototype Labiata and Black Lilith.
1508700007.korean: - 그리고 금방 라비아타와 리리스 두 사람을 찾을 수 있었다.

1508700049.english: After finishing the fight with Zeta, I was able to return safely with Prototype Labiata and Black Lilith.
1508700049.korean: - 제타와의 싸움을 끝내고 나는 라비아타와 리리스 두 사람과 함께 무사히 돌아올 수 있었다.

1508700103.english: Ep, Epsilon? Why is Epsilon's voice coming from the security SD3M Pupp Head?
1508700103.korean: 엡, 엡실론? 어째서 경비용 펍 헤드에서 엡실론의 목소리가?

1508800035.english: With those words, SD3M Pupp Head lowered his head and stopped moving.
1508800035.korean: - 그 말을 끝으로 펍 헤드의 몸이 고개를 떨구고 움직임을 멈췄다.

1508800074.english: What are the conditions for the appearance of the hidden character Cardinal Armand in Orca & Fighter?
1508800074.korean: 오르카 앤 파이터의 히든 캐릭터 아르망의 출현 조건은?

1508800075.english: What is the command for T-2 Brownie's Super Special Move in Steel Line Fighter VI?
1508800075.korean: 스틸라인 파이터 Ⅵ 브라우니의 초필살기 커맨드는?

1508900043.english: Calm down, Connector Yumi. The situation is terrible, but it doesn't hinder your ability to move.
1508900043.korean: 진정해, 유미.&n상황은 최악이지만 움직이는 데 지장이 있는 건 아니야.

1509000029.english: I came to save you, Connector Yumi!

1509000033.english: So, Connector Yumi, why on earth are you in a place like this?
1509000033.korean: 그래서, 유미 너는 대체 왜 이런 곳에 있는 거야?

1509000042.english: Okay, let's move to a different spot for now. Connector Yumi, you're definitely coming along, right?
1509000042.korean: 그래 일단 자리를 옮기자.&n유미 너도 당연히 따라올 거지?

1509000044.english: Did you say your name was Connector Yumi...? I have something to ask you...
1509000044.korean: 유미라고 했나…? 너한테는 물어볼 게 있어…

1509100026.english: Lemonade Omega's lieutenant Connector Yumi confirmed as a member of Empressis Hound.
1509100026.korean: 레모네이드 오메가의 부관 유미, 엠프레시스 하운드 멤버로 확인.

1509300023.english: Connector Yumi, I'm sorry, but is that okay?

1509400022.english: You're late! Rhode, hurry up and get ready! It's time to sortie! Poseidon's unit will now charge into the heart of the battlefield and wipe out the enemy!
1509400022.korean: 늦었구나! 로데, 어서 준비해라 출전이다!&n포세이돈 부대는 이제부터 전장 한 가운데 들어가 적들을 쓸어버린다!

1509400031.english: Rhode? What are you doing? Why aren't you getting ready to compete?
1509400031.korean: 로데? 뭘 하고 있죠? 어서 출전 준비를 하지 않고?

1510000015.english: But I heard Cheona Big Sis was being cute in front of the commander the day before yesterday? I heard the commander was terrified.
1510000015.korean: 근데 천아 언니 그제 사령관 앞에서 애교 부렸다면서? 사령관이 기겁했다던데?

1510000019.english: Cheona Big Sis, don't be like that. We're going to look at clothes. Do you want to come too, sis?
1510000019.korean: 천아 언니~ 그러지 말고, 옷 보러 갈 건데. 언니도 같이 갈래?

1510000025.english: T-14 Miho, that would suit you. Red, aren't you buying any new clothes?
1510000025.korean: 미호 너한테 어울리긴 하겠네. 빨강이 너는 따로 옷 안 사?

1510000038.english: Honestly, hasn't that been the same outfit since I first saw Cheona Big Sis?
1510000038.korean: 솔직히, 천아 언니 처음 봤을 때부터 지금까지 저 옷 아니었어?

1510000043.english: But, in my opinion, I think Cheona Unnie would look better in clothes that suit her image rather than those flashy ones.
1510000043.korean: 근데, 내가 볼 땐 천아 언니는 저런 화려한 옷보단 언니 이미지에 맞는 옷이 더 좋을 거 같은데?

1510000046.english: Oh, how about this? Auntie. This suits Cheona Big Sis really well, doesn't it?
1510000046.korean: 아, 이거 어때? 이모. 이거 천아 언니한테 잘 어울리지~ 그렇지?

1510000054.english: Cheona Big Sis. How about you try it on once? I think the commander will like it.
1510000054.korean: 천아 언니. 일단 한 번 입어보는 거 어때? 사령관이 좋아할 거 같은데.

1510000058.english: Come to think of it, it is really strange that Cheona is acting like that. I always thot you were so relaxed.
1510000058.korean: 그러고보니 천아 언니가 저러는 거 진짜 이상하긴 해. 맨날 여유 넘치는 줄 알았는데.

1510000064.english: Even tho my aunt's expressions are blunt, I like that I can feel she cares a lot about Cheona.
1510000064.korean: 이모가 쓰는 표현은 퉁명스러워도, 천아 언니 많이 신경 써주는 게 느껴져서 좋은 거 같아.

1510000072.english: Sister. That's really good, isn't it? You're the first person I've seen pull off this kind of vibe in casual clothes, Cheona Big Sis...
1510000072.korean: 언니. 진짜 괜찮은데? 나 사복으로 이런 느낌 내는 건 천아 언니가 처음이야…

1520000004.english: - The member who opened the door and entered was Cheona.
1520000004.korean: - 문을 열고 들어 온 대원은 천아였다.

1520000005.english: - However, the atmosphere was completely different from the usual Cheona.
1520000005.korean: - 하지만 평소의 천아와는 확연히 분위기가 달라졌다.

1520000008.english: It wasn't strange. Rather, it fits Cheona perfectly, looking as if it were the clothes he was originally wearing.
1520000008.korean: - 이상한 건 아니었다. 오히려 천아와 딱 맞는 옷이라 원래 입고 있던 옷처럼 꼭 어울린다.

1520000012.english: - Since I have some time to spare anyway, and I've never spent time alone with Cheona, I came out with him to clear my head.
1520000012.korean: - 어차피 시간도 남고, 천아와 단 둘이 시간을 보낸 적은 없으니 머리를 비울 겸 같이 나왔다.

1520000014.english: - Cheona suddenly pushed a cart over, hopped right in, and stuck out her tongue.&nReluctantly, I pushed the cart that Cheona was in and wandered around the sales office.
1520000014.korean: - 천아는 대뜸 카트를 밀고 오더니 별안간 덜렁, 그 안에 타곤 혀를 내밀었다.&n하는 수 없이 천아가 탄 카트를 밀며 영업소 여기저기를 어슬렁 돌아다녔다.

1520000017.english: - I should ask Fafnir later if he got shaken down by Cheona...
1520000017.korean: - 나중에 파프니르에게 천아한테서 삥을 뜯기진 않았는지 물어봐야겠다…

1520000019.english: - Cheona sat in the cart, pointing at various things and wearing an excited expression.&nAs I was pulling the cart around like that, Cheona looked up at me and said,
1520000019.korean: - 천아는 카트 안에 앉아 이것 저것 가리키며 신나는 표정을 지었다. &n그렇게 카트를 끌고다니던 중 천아가 나를 올려다보며 말했다.

1520000027.english: - Cheona closed his eyes as if recalling a long-forgotten memory.&nLooking around, I soon stopped in front of a sign that read "Hot Pack Mass Sale," and Cheona gave me a thumbs up.
1520000027.korean: -천아는 오랜 기억을 더듬는 듯 눈을 감았다. &n주변을 둘러보다 이내, 핫팩 대량 세일이란 문구 앞에 멈춰서자 천아가 엄지를 치켜 세운다.

1520000032.english: - I've never once felt that Cheona's personality was bad. Should I say it's rather comfortable?&nUnlike the other members, being with Cheona makes me feel much more comfortable and carefree.
1520000032.korean: - 천아의 성격을 나쁘게 느낀 적은 단 한 번도 없다. 오히려 편하다고 해야 할까? &n일반 대원들과 달리, 천아와 함께 있으면 한결 마음이 편하고 홀가분해진다.

1520000039.english: - While shopping, Cheona stopped the cart she was pushing and grumbled, looking up at me.
1520000039.korean: - 장을 보던 천아는 밀던 카트를 멈추게 하더니 나를 올려다보며 투덜거렸다.

1520000041.english: - In response to my question, Cheona took a step closer, then stood right in front of me.
1520000041.korean: - 내 질문에 천아는 한 걸음 더 다가가, 이내 내 앞에 바짝 붙어 섰다.

1520000045.english: - Cheona threw a bundle of hand warmers into the cart with a nervous gesture and then opened her mouth.
1520000045.korean: - 천아는 핫팩 묶음을 신경질적으로 카트에 던져둔 뒤 입을 열었다.

1520000047.english: - Come to think of it, the Empress Hound unit itself was created for terrorism, wasn't it...?&nBecause Cheona is so cheerful, I had completely forgotten what these children used to do.
1520000047.korean: - 그러고보니 엠프레시스 하운드 자체가 테러를 위해 만들어진 부대였지…?&n천아가 너무 밝기만 하다보니 원래 이 아이들이 무슨 일을 했었는지 까맣게 잊고 있었다.

1520000049.english: - After grumbling like that, Cheona, who was now nestled in my arms, continued speaking in a whisper.
1520000049.korean: - 그렇게 투덜거린 천아는 꼭 내 품에 안긴 뒤, 이내 품 안에서 속삭이듯 말을 이어갔다.

1520000052.english: - Then I finally understood why Cheona had suggested spending time with me today.
1520000052.korean: - 그제야 나는 어째서 천아가 오늘 나와 시간을 보내자 이야기를 했는지 알 것 같았다.

1520000054.english: - As I hugged Cheona tightly, she stood on tiptoe, cupped her cheeks with her hands, and said,
1520000054.korean: - 그렇게 천아를 꼭 안아주자, 그녀는 까치발을 들어 두 볼을 손으로 감싸며 말했다.

1520000056.english: - And then, Cheona turned his head and pressed his lips against mine.&nBoldly, her soft tongue pushed its way into my mouth.
1520000056.korean: - 그리고 천아는 고개를 틀어 내 입술에 자신의 입술을 포갰다. &n대담하게, 그녀의 말캉한 혀가 내 입 안을 비집고 들어왔다.

1520000057.english: - Finally, when he parted his lips, a blush bloomed on Cheona's white cheeks.
1520000057.korean: - 이윽고 입술을 뗐을 땐 천아의 하얀 볼에 홍조가 피어올랐다.

1520000061.english: - Cheona soon looked at me intently, smiled, and said,
1520000061.korean: - 천아는 이내 나를 지긋이 바라보다 미소지으며 말했다.

1520000063.english: - As Cheona confessed her true feelings, she hopped off the cart and continued singing, pretending to hold a microphone in her hand.
1520000063.korean: - 자신의 진심을 고백하던 천아는 카트에서 훌쩍 내린 뒤, 손으로 마이크를 쥐는 시늉을 하며 노래를 이어갔다.

1520000065.english: - As if her life had been full of ups and downs, Cheona's voice, flowing to the strong melody, was sweet yet strong.
1520000065.korean: - 말 그대로 파란만장했다던 삶이었다는 듯, 강한 선율에 흘리는 천아의 목소리는 달콤하면서도 단단했다.

1520000066.english: - As the song ended, Cheona approached me and hugged me tightly.
1520000066.korean: - 그렇게 노래가 끝나자, 천아는 내게 다가와 꼭 안겼다.

1520000070.english: - Cheona closed her eyes for a moment, as if lost in thought, then slowly opened them again. And then, he smiled.
1520000070.korean: - 천아는 잠시 생각에 잠기듯 눈을 감다, 이내 천천히 떴다. 그리고 이내 미소를 지었다.

1520000073.english: - I hugged Cheona tightly. It seemed as if he wouldn't let go of even my back, constantly stroking and groping it.
1520000073.korean: - 나는 천아를 꼭 끌어안아주었다. 천아도 놓지 않으려는 듯 내 등을 연신 쓸며 더듬었다.

1520000076.english: - After finishing his answer, Cheona took my hand and smiled brightly.
1520000076.korean: - 천아는 대답을 마친 뒤, 내 손을 잡고 해맑게 웃었다.

1520000078.english: - Instead of answering, I put Cheona in the cart and pushed it hard toward the corner she wanted to go to.
1520000078.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 천아를 카트에 태운 후 그녀가 가자는 코너로 카트를 세게 밀었다.

1520000081.english: - When I answered smoothly, Cheona frowned, then put her underwear directly into the cart, stood up abruptly, and glared at me.
1520000081.korean: -능청스럽게 대답하자, 천아는 미간을 좁히더니, 그대로 속옷을 카트 안에 넣곤 벌떡 일어서 나를 째려봤다.

1520000084.english: - Saying that, Cheona then pointed to the changing room.
1520000084.korean: - 천아는 그렇게 말하더니, 이내 탈의실을 손가락으로 가리켰다.

1520000086.english: - After saying that, Cheona grabbed my collar and pushed me straight into the changing room.&nThen, with a grin, he stuck out his tongue.
1520000086.korean: - 천아는 그렇게 말한 뒤, 내 옷깃을 잡고 그대로 탈의실 안에 밀어넣었다. &n그리곤 씩 웃으며 혀를 날름거렸다.

1520000088.english: - Instead, I locked the dressing room door at the provocative gesture of Cheona.
1520000088.korean: - 나는 오히려 나를 도발하는 천아의 몸짓에 나는 탈의실의 문을 걸어 잠갔다.

1520000089.english: And then, after a very long time had passed, it was when they emerged, exhausted, carrying Cheona on their back.
1520000089.korean: 그렇게 아주 긴 시간이 지나고, 기진맥진한 천아를 업고 나온 그때였다.

1520000094.english: -Fatima's stern voice finally made Cheona and me apologize and leave.
1520000094.korean: -파티마의 엄한 목소리에 결국 천아와 나는 사과를 하고 나왔다.

1520000097.english: - Cheona hugged me tightly, but not so tightly that it choked me. The cloth hanging behind my back quietly opened its mouth.
1520000097.korean: - 천아는 내 목을 조이지 않을 정도로 끌어안았다. 내 등 뒤에 매달린 천아는 조용히 입을 열었다.

1520000100.english: - Come to think of it, the song Cheona was singing earlier was also a rock-style song. Perhaps they want to be in a band?
1520000100.korean: - 그러고 보니 천아가 아까 불렀던 노래도 락 스타일의 노래였다. 아마도 밴드를 하고 싶은 걸까?

1520000109.english: - Saying that, Cheona pulled me into a hug, as if he would never let go again, and kissed my cheek.
1520000109.korean: - 그렇게 말한 천아는 다신 놓지 않겠다는 듯 내 목을 끌어안곤 볼에 뽀뽀했다.

1520000111.english: - Turning my head at the surprisingly affectionate tone of Cheona's voice, which I could hardly believe, I saw him smiling happily at me.
1520000111.korean: - 천아의 말이라곤 믿을 수 없을 정도로 살가운 어투에 고개를 돌리자, 천아는 나를 보며 행복한 미소를 짓고 있었다.

1520000112.english: - Originally, I was planning to take Cheona back to the lodging, but I decided to enjoy this time a bit more, indulging in Cheona's cuteness as she bounced her feet while being carried on my back.
1520000112.korean: -원래라면 숙소에 천아를 데려다 줄 계획이었지만, 내 등에 업힌 채 발을 동동 구르는 천아의 애교를 더 받아주며 이 시간을 즐기기로 했다.

1530000010.english: - Although it's been said that the Lemonade Beta individuals have been used and discarded like expendables due to Simon's mSerapias Alice...
1530000010.korean: - 여태껏 레모네이드 베타의 개체들은 시몬의 악의에 의해 소모품처럼 쓰이고 버려졌다곤 하지만…

1530000019.english: - While I'm at it, I should ask Audrey Dreamweaver to make new beta clothes.
1530000019.korean: - 이참에 오드리한테 새로운 베타의 옷을 부탁해 봐야겠다.

1530000028.english: A small smile forming on Beta's lips put my mind at ease.&nTo keep my promise to Beta, I summoned Audrey Dreamweaver to the commander's office.
1530000028.korean: - 베타의 입가에 자그마한 호가 그려지자 마음이 놓였다.&n베타와 약속을 지키기 위해서, 나는 사령관실로 오드리를 호출했다.

1530000034.english: - I responded to Audrey Dreamweaver's sulky pout with a smile.
1530000034.korean: - 오드리의 새침한 투정에 나는 미소로 화답했다.

1530000039.english: - Audrey Dreamweaver tilted her head and chuckled at my cautious question.
1530000039.korean: - 내 조심스러운 질문에 오드리는 고개를 갸웃거리다 픽 웃었다.

1530000043.english: - When Audrey Dreamweaver and I turned around, Beta, who had fallen flat on his back, was standing up looking disheveled, unable to hide his startled expression.
1530000043.korean: - 나와 오드리가 뒤를 돌아보자 그곳엔 벌러덩 넘어졌던 베타가 엉망이된 모습으로 일어나 화들짝 놀란 표정을 감추지 못하고 서있었다.

1530000075.english: Should I ask Audrey Dreamweaver for a favor?

1550000040.english: - I had no idea what had happened to Beta, but...&nJust one thing: I remembered my recent conversation with Beta and told Alpha that I had tried to give Audrey Dreamweaver's clothes to her.
1550000040.korean: - 베타한테 무슨 일이 있었던 건지 짐작가는 바가 전혀 없었지만… &n단 하나, 최근 베타와의 대화를 떠올렸고, 그녀에게 오드리의 옷을 선물하려 했다는 이야기를 알파에게 꺼냈다.

1560000068.english: The commander... the clothes he gave me as a gift? But, I don't think the clothes Audrey Dreamweaver made are something I can pull off.
1560000068.korean: 사령관님이… 선물한 옷이요? 근데, 오드리 님이 만드신 옷은 제가 소화할 수 있는 옷이 아닐 것 같은데.

1560000070.english: ...it won't suit you. Even if it's just to not let Audrey Dreamweaver's hard work go to waste... This outfit would suit someone else better than me.
1560000070.korean: …안 어울릴 거예요. 오드리 님의 수고를 헛되게 하지 않기 위해서라도... 이 옷은 제가 아닌 다른 분이 입는 게 더 어울릴 거예요.

1570000003.english: - Oh yeah, I was going to go visit Beta and give him a gift on the date Audrey Dreamweaver told me about... but I got so busy with work that I completely forgot.
1570000003.korean: - 그랬었지, 오드리가 말해준 날짜에 찾아 베타한테 선물하려 했었는데… 업무가 많다 보니 그만 새카맣게 잊고 있었다.

1570000027.english: Master... I'm sorry for overstepping and eavesdropping on the conversation between you and Audrey Dreamweaver, and for misunderstanding it on my own.
1570000027.korean: 주인님… 제가 주제넘게 오드리 님과 주인님이 주고받으신 대화를 엿듣고 멋대로 오해해서 죄송해요.

1570000028.english: - Perhaps Beta interpreted the conversation Audrey Dreamweaver and I had in a slightly negative way.
1570000028.korean: - 아마도 베타는 나와 오드리가 했던 이야기를, 조금 안 좋은 쪽으로 해석해 들었나 보다.

1594000020.english: Oh, that's quite good, Alcyone! I'll ask Sowan to filet the fish for me!
1594000020.korean: 오오, 제법이구나 알키오네! 소완한테 부탁해서 회를 떠달라 하면 되겠구나!

1595000034.english: Let's go together... and eat cotton candy... and dress up as Magical Magical MoMo in the sticker photo booth...
1595000034.korean: 같이… 가서 솜사탕도 먹고… 스티커 사진기에서 매지컬 모모 복장도…

1595000035.english: I never thot you'd be interested in Magical Magical MoMo these days too, senior...&nCould we possibly dress up together and take some photos?
1595000035.korean: 선배도 매지컬 모모를 요새 관심 있어 할 줄은 몰랐다…&n혹시 같이, 분장하고 사진도 같이 찍을 수 있나?

1596000036.english: Before the destruction, I never thot I'd have to use this body again, which was said to have been used by only a few individuals.&nSince I was told I'd need to use this body, Goltarion taught me how to act like a reaper.
1596000036.korean: 멸망 전, 일부 개체들만 썼다던 이 소체를 이렇게 다시 쓸 일이 생길 줄은 몰랐습니다.&n이 소체를 쓸 일이 있다고 하니, 골타리온이 제게 사신 연기를 가르쳐주었지요.

1596000080.english: Hehe... I think I'll have to ask Audrey Dreamweaver to fix it when I get back.
1596000080.korean: 헤헤… 돌아가면 오드리한테 수선 맡겨야 할 것 같아.

1596000081.english: Hmm, Alcyone. I may not be as perfect as Audrey Dreamweaver…  &nbut when I was wandering the sea for a long time, I once tailored clothes for the Minister of Finance and the Chief of Staff.
1596000081.korean: 흐음, 알키오네. 내가 오드리처럼 완벽하진 않지만… &n한참 바다를 떠돌던 때, 재정부 장관과 참모총장의 옷을 수선해줬을 때가 있었지.

1596000082.english: If you don't mind, how about letting me take care of the repairs? Of course... I can't do it as perfectly as Audrey Dreamweaver, but...&nStill, it's my first date with the admiral, wouldn't it be better to wear something meaningful?
1596000082.korean: 괜찮다면 내게 수선을 맡겨보는 건 어떻겠나? 물론... 오드리보다 완벽히 해주진 못하겠지만.&n그래도 제독과의 첫 데이트인데 뜻깊은 옷을 입고 가는 것이 좋지 않겠나?

1597000023.english: I'm sorry... I don't think I can do this anymore... It's too scary here...&nToday, I was planning to cosplay as Magical Magical MoMo with you, but...
1597000023.korean: 미안하다… 아무래도… 더는 못할 것 같아… 여긴 너무, 무섭다…&n오늘은 너랑 매지컬 모모 코스프레를 할 생각이었는데…

1597000052.english: (Don't worry, Commander. Please look forward to my performance, honed by Goltarion's special training in acting.
1597000052.korean: (걱정마십시오, 사령관. 골타리온의 연기 특훈으로 다져진 저의 활약을 기대해주십시오.)

1597000063.english: (Goltarion said that the best acting is method acting. Please watch over me, Commander.
1597000063.korean: (골타리온이 말하길, 연기의 최고는 메소드 연기라 했습니다. 절 지켜봐 주십시오, 사령관님.)

1600819001.english: Commander, Commander! I've finally figured out the answer to Haka's Lost Technology!
1600819001.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님! 하카의 로스트 테크놀로지에 대한 해답을 드디어 알아냈어요!

1600819002.english: As I was sitting in the commander's office doing my usual work, the door burst open and Orca technical staff brought in some documents and thrust them in front of me.
1600819002.korean: - 언제나 사령관실에 앉아 업무를 보고 있던 그때, 문이 벌컥 열리며 오르카 기술부원들이 서류들을 가져와 내 앞에 내밀었다.

1600819003.english: Unlike in the past, the current Orca has grown large enough to deploy a field army unit on the battlefield, making smooth transportation and supply crucial.
1600819003.korean: - 예전과 달리 지금의 오르카는, 야전군 단위를 전장에 운용할 수 있을 정도로 몸집이 커진 만큼, &n원할한 수송과 보급이 중요해졌다.

1600819004.english: - Since there may be situations where Doom Bringers and Sky Knights need to be deployed deep inland, there is also a need for a long-distance air hub to replace Orca's launch pod.
1600819004.korean: - 내륙 깊숙한 곳까지 둠 브링어와 스카이나이츠가 출진해야 할 상황이 발생할 수도 있기에,&n오르카의 사출포드를 대신할 장거리 항공 허브의 필요성도 있다.

1600819005.english: While such practical reasons played a part, the biggest reason was the embarrassment of not having been able to keep the promise to make a haka for Sterling again.
1600819005.korean: - 이런 현실적인 이유도 한몫하지만, &n여태 스털링에게 하카를 다시 만들어주겠다던 약속을 지키지 못한 탓에 겸연쩍은 마음이 무엇보다 컸다.

1600819006.english: Now, Commander. Would you like to take a look at this? I asked the Doctor, and he said that while a vacuum airship would be difficult to design in this way, the implementation itself is theoretically possible. Also, cloaking fields, thermal stealth, and radio wave stealth... like this... and the hybrid fusion reactor... like this...
1600819006.korean: 자, 사령관님. 이걸 보시겠어요? 닥터한테 물어 본 결과 진공 상태의 비행선은 이런식으로 설계된다면 어렵겠지만 공학 이론상 구현 자체는 가능하다고 했어요. 또 은폐장과 열, 전파 스텔스는 이렇게… 복합핵융합로는 이렇게…

1600819007.english: Since it requires special Black River parts, mass production is obviously impossible... but we can fix the remaining parts as much as possible and redesign it to have close performance, you know?!
1600819007.korean: 블랙리버 특수 부품이 들어가야 해서, 양산은 당연히 불가능하거든...&n하지만 남은 부품들을 최대한 고쳐서 근접한 성능으로 재설계를 할 수 있긴 하거든?!

1600819008.english: You don't need to worry about that. As our occupied territory has expanded, our resources and budget have become much more abundant.
1600819008.korean: 그건 걱정하지 않으셔도 돼요. 저희 점령지가 넓어진 만큼 자원과 예산은 많이 풍족해졌어요.

1600819009.english: Other commanders also have a positive view of Haka's redesign.
1600819009.korean: 다른 지휘관 분들도 하카의 재설계에 대해 긍정적인 생각을 가지고 계시고요.

1600819010.english: If we refer to the blueprints we drew, we should be able to manufacture it in about half a year at the latest, you know?
1600819010.korean: 우리가 그린 설계도를 참고하면 못해도 반년 정도면 제작 가능할 거거든?

1600819011.english: Hehe, I think it would be a good idea to tell Sterling, who might like it the most, right away too!
1600819011.korean: 후후, 어쩌면 제일 좋아할 스털링 동생한테도 빨리 알려주는 게 좋을 것 같거든!

1600819012.english: Now that Gremlin and Fortune have spoken confidently, the design for the Haka's restoration will proceed rapidly without further delay. Then, the only remaining issue is which unit to assign Sterling, who has experience piloting the Haka, to.
1600819012.korean: - 그렘린과 포츈이 자신 있게 말한 이상, 이제 하카의 복원 설계는 더 이상의 지체 없이 쾌속으로 진행될 것이다.&n그렇다면 이제 남은 건, 하카를 조종한 경험이 있는 스털링을 어느 부대로 배속하느냐의 문제이다.

1600819014.english: Huh? I didn't know Captain Mei and Fafnir would be here too. What brings you here, with that idiot and Captain Mei all gathered together?
1600819014.korean: 어라? 메이 대장님이랑 파프니르도 같이 있을 줄은 몰랐네요.&n무슨 일로 저 바보랑 메이 대장님이 모두 모인 자리에 절 부르신건가요?

1600819015.english: Of course, considering the Doom Bringer unit handled transport duties before the apocalypse, isn't it only natural that Sterling should become a member of our unit?
1600819015.korean: 당연히, 멸망 전 둠 브링어 부대가 수송 업무를 전담했던 만큼&n스털링은 우리 부대원이 돼야 하는 게 당연한 거 아니겠어?

1600819016.english: If we are going to redesign the Haka while we're at it, wouldn't it be better to enhance its value as a flying battleship for the Doom Bringer and Sky Knights rather than settling for simple transport purposes?
1600819016.korean: - 이참에 하카를 재설계한다면, 단순한 수송 용도로 만족하기 보단 &n둠 브링어와 스카이나이츠가 쓸 비행전함으로서의 가치를 더 살리는 게 낫지 않을까.

1600819017.english: No! Sterling was my subordinate! Of course he should be a member of the Empress Hound, the unit I belong to!
1600819017.korean: 안 돼! 스털링은 내 부하였단 말이야! 당연히 내가 소속된 엠프레시스 하운드 멤버가 돼야 맞는 거지!

1600819018.english: - … Of course, there is plenty of room for Fafnir, who has been with us for a long time, to feel very disappointed.
1600819018.korean: - …물론 오랜 시간 함께 해왔던 파프니르가 많이 서운해할 여지가 충분하다.

1600819020.english: Hey... Sterling! You've been traveling with me all this time! So of course it makes sense for you to become an Empress Hound. Right?!
1600819020.korean: 야... 스털링! 여태껏 너는 나랑 같이 다녔었잖아! &n그러니까 당연히 엠프레시스 하운드가 되는 게 맞지. 그렇지?!

1600819021.english: You're counting your chickens before the rice cakes are even out of your reach...
1600819021.korean: 떡 줄 사람은 생각지도 않는데, 김치국부터 마시긴…

1600819022.english: I don't like rice cakes and kimchi soup!

1600819023.english: Yeah, that’s what makes him our former captain.

1600819024.english: ...It doesn't matter if you assign me wherever you want, Commander. I'm grateful just for you redesigning the Haka.
1600819024.korean: ...사령관님께서 절 원하시는 어디로든 배속해 주셔도 상관없어요. &n하카를 재설계해 주시는 것만으로도 감사한걸요.

1600819026.english: Anyway, since transport was a fact, I suppose supporting the Doom Bringers is... the right thing to do, right?
1600819026.korean: 어쨌든 수송이 제 업무였던 건 팩트니까, 역시 둠 브링어 분들을 지원해 드리는 게... 맞겠죠?

1600819027.english: Eeeeeek! Th-Traitor! How many years have we been together?!
1600819027.korean: 이이이이익! 배, 배신자! 나랑 지내 온 세월이 얼마인데?!

1600819028.english: Okay. Since you'll need to work in sync with us from now on, could you assign you right away? As there happens to be a mock drill coming up, I want to make sure you familiarize yourself with what strategies you need to support in advance.
1600819028.korean: 좋아. 앞으로는 우리와 호흡을 맞춰야 하니, 당장 배속 시켜줄 수 있겠어?&n마침 모의 훈련이 있는 만큼, 우리의 어떤 전략을 보조해 줘야 할지 미리 숙지시켜주고 싶거든.

1600819029.english: C-C-Haka is... the nest that carries my treasure... I said!
1600819029.korean: 씨이… 하, 하카는… 내 보물을 싣는 둥지…라고!

1600819030.english: … Fafnir. Did you think of loading your junk onto the rebuilt Hakaeda again?
1600819030.korean: …파프니르. 너 재건된 하카에다 또 네 잡동사니를 싣을 생각한 거야?

1600819031.english: Damn it... That wasn't the case! I even gave you pure gold specially because you're my first subordinate! ...Fine! Go live well and prosper as a Doom Bringer!
1600819031.korean: 씨이… 그건 아니었다고! 내 첫 부하라서 특별히 순금까지 줬는데!&n...그래! 둠 브링어 가서 잘 먹고 잘 살아라!

1600819032.english: Fafnir puffed out his cheeks, grumbled, and left the commander's office.
1600819032.korean: - 파프니르는 볼을 부풀린 뒤 투덜거리며 사령관실을 나갔다.

1600819034.english: It's driving me crazy in so many ways... Should I hate this, or should I understand it?
1600819034.korean: 여러모로 사람 돌게 만드네… 이걸 미워해야 하나, 이해해야 하나.

1600819035.english: Looks like the two of you shared quite a few memories? I don't think he's acting like that because he wants Haka.
1600819035.korean: 둘이서 나눈 추억이 꽤 많았나 봐? 하카가 탐나서 저러는 건 아닌 거 같은데.

1600819036.english: … He was an unreliable leader, but it is also true that we spent a long time together anyway.
1600819036.korean: …못 미더운 리더긴 했지만 어쨌든 오랜 시간 함께 지낸 것도 사실이니까요.

1600819037.english: A gold hairpin was stuck in Sterling's bangs as he said that.
1600819037.korean: - 그렇게 말한 스털링의 앞머리에는 금색의 머리핀 하나가 꽂혀있었다.

1600819038.english: Unlike Sterling's fastidious personality, the elaborately decorated pin and earrings seemed to resemble Fafnir's free-spirited nature.
1600819038.korean: - 깐깐한 스털링의 성격과는 다르게, 화려하게 장식된 핀과 귀걸이는 &n파프니르의 자유분방한 모습을 닮은 듯했다.

1600819039.english: These hairpins and earrings are a gift Fafnir gave me after he first obtained the treasure.
1600819039.korean: 이 머리 핀이랑 귀걸이들은 파프니르가 처음 보물을 얻은 뒤에 저한테 준 선물이에요.

1600819040.english: He said it was made of pure gold but he was giving it to me specifically because it was you... But you know what? It's just plating. They say even hate is affection... I just wore it around out of a sense of foolish kindness...
1600819040.korean: 순금으로 된 거지만 특별히 너니까 주는 거라 했는데… 근데 말이죠, 이거 도금이에요.&n미운 정도 정이라고… 바보 호의를 봐서 그냥 하고 다녀준 거죠...

1600819041.english: The way they talk sounds a bit prickly, but they're totally tsundere...
1600819041.korean: 말투는 틱틱 거리는 것 같은데 이거 완전 츤데레…

1600819043.english: Anyway, so. What are you going to do, Commander?
1600819043.korean: 하여튼 그래서. 어떻게 할 거야 사령관?

1600819044.english: I understand Fafnir's frustration, but... considering Haka's transport capacity, it is right to assign him to the Doom Bringer, which requires powerful firepower projection.
1600819044.korean: - 파프니르가 속상해하는 기분은 이해하지만… &n하카의 수송량을 생각한다면, 막강한 화력 투사가 필요한 둠 브링어에 배속하는 것이 옳다.

1600819045.english: Yes, Chief Sterling. I will do my best not to disappoint you!
1600819045.korean: 네, 기관장 스털링. 실망시켜드리지 않게 열심히 하겠습니다!

1600819046.english: I nodded and gave a thumbs up.

1600819047.english: Hey, Fafnir! Buy me ice cream!

1600819048.english: I lost the bet, so how about snacks instead of ice cream?
1600819048.korean: 이번 내기에서 졌는데 아이스크림 말고 과자는 어때?

1600819049.english: … Is there anything you want to eat?

1600819050.english: He's suddenly so obedient? What's wrong with Fafnir?
1600819050.korean: 갑자기 너무 말을 잘 듣는데? 파프니르 왜 이래?

1600819051.english: Is it because of Sterling? I actually heard he was being assigned to the Doom Bringer today.
1600819051.korean: 혹시 스털링 일 때문에 그래? 안 그래도 오늘 둠 브링어에 배속된다고 들었는데.

1600819052.english: I've been looking for you for a while. What were you doing here?

1600819054.english: Shall we talk for a moment?

1600819056.english: … Seriously. I thought you’d be happy to load your junk onto the new haka... Why are you sniffling like you’ll never see me again?
1600819056.korean: …참나. 새로 만든 하카에 네 잡동사니 실을 거라며 좋아할 줄 알았더니만... &n왜 다시 못 만날 사람처럼 훌쩍거려.

1600819057.english: It's not like I'm disappearing from Orca.

1600819058.english: Do you really… want to go as the Doom Bringer?
1600819058.korean: 정말… 둠 브링어로 가고 싶은 거야?

1600819059.english: Rather than wanting to go, I feel like I need to go to where I am truly needed to be of help. Since Haka was a transport ship, I thought he might officially become part of the Doom Bringers, and it turns out that's exactly what happened.
1600819059.korean: 가고 싶기보단, 내가 꼭 필요한 곳으로 가야 힘이 될 수 있지 않을까 하는 생각이 들어.&n하카도 수송선이었던 만큼, 정식으로 둠 브링어 소속이 되지 않을까 싶었는데, 정말 그렇게 됐네.

1600819061.english: Ugh... seriously. Why the look on your face, huh?
1600819061.korean: 하… 진짜. 왜 그 표정이야, 응?

1600819062.english: That's not it... Eeeeeeeek!! Get out of here, man!!

1600819063.english: It’s just that our affiliations have changed; it’s not like we’re cutting ties... If that’s not the point, and you’re just disappointed that you can’t fill the Haka with weird stuff again, then just give up on that already.
1600819063.korean: 소속만 달라질 뿐이지, 우리가 인연을 끊는 것도 아니잖아…&n그게 아니라 하카에 또 이상한 물건 채워넣는 걸 못해서 아쉬운 거면 빨리 포기하고.

1600819064.english: So now you're even pinching my cheek just because I belong to a completely different unit?!
1600819064.korean: 이젠 아주 다른 부대 소속이라고 볼까지 꼬집는다 이거지?!

1600819067.english: What on earth do you think I am?!
1600819067.korean: 너, 너 날 대체 뭐라고 생각하는 거야?!

1600819068.english: An ignorant fool. A naive and clueless idiot.
1600819068.korean: 무식한 바보. 순진하고 세상물정 모르는 멍청이.

1600819069.english: Give back the hairpin and earrings I gave you! Even the gift I gave you was a waste!
1600819069.korean: 내가 줬던 머리핀이랑 귀걸이 내놔! 내가 너한테 준 선물도 아까워!

1600819070.english: Still, it was fun being with you, Captain.
1600819070.korean: 그래도 함께 하는 동안 즐거웠던 대장.

1600819071.english: Captain? Did you just say Captain?

1600819074.english: Ah, look at him crying again. Sometimes I can't believe he's a member of the Empresses Hound.
1600819074.korean: 아 또 우는 거 봐. 가끔 보면 그 엠프레시스 하운드의 멤버라는 게 믿기질 않네.

1600819075.english: Damn it! I'm taking this for granted, really give that back! Repaying kindness with hostility?!
1600819075.korean: 씨이! 안 되겠어, 그거 진짜 내놔! 은혜를 원수로 갚아?!

1600819076.english: I don't want to. You said it was the first treasure you ever bestowed upon someone else, so why are you asking me to give it back?
1600819076.korean: 싫은데. 네가 처음으로 타인에게 하사한 보물이라면서 왜 다시 내놓으라 그래?

1600819077.english: Hmph, you said you weren't interested in gold, but look like you're coveting it now?
1600819077.korean: 흥, 황금에 관심 없다더니, 이제 와 탐나기라도 하나 보네?

1600819079.english: Yeah, I guess I did get a little greedy. Maybe it's because you gave it to me.
1600819079.korean: 그래, 나도 욕심이 좀 생기긴 했나 보다. 네가 준 거라서 그런 걸지도 모르겠네.

1600819080.english: Thank you for everything. Make sure you eat well, don't get needlessly swayed by the other kids... and brush your teeth properly.
1600819080.korean: 그간 고마웠어. 밥도 잘 챙겨먹고, 다른 애들한테 쓸데 없이 휘둘리지 말고…  이도 잘 닦고.

1600819081.english: … Ha, stop worrying for nothing. You go and do your job properly.

1600819083.english: Mei is still the commander of a unit, so... she must be smarter than me. Go work hard, you idiot.
1600819083.korean: 메이는 그래도 한 부대의 대장이니까… 나보단 머리가 좋겠지.&n가서 열심히 일이나 하라고. 이 바보 멍청아.

1600819084.english: And you can have that. No matter how much I like gold, I wouldn't give it to a subordinate and then take it back.
1600819084.korean: 그리고 그거 너 가져. 아무리 황금이 좋대도 부하한테 줬다 뺏는 짓은 안 하니까.

1600819086.english: Captain! It's obviously a trap, so how could you touch it?!
1600819086.korean: 대장! 누가 봐도 함정인데, 그걸 만지면 어떡해요?!

1600819088.english: Can't you see the giant AGS over there?! It looks like it's going to turn into dried squid...
1600819088.korean: 저기 지금 거대 AGS 안 보여요?! 쥐포 되게 생겼…

1600819091.english: Take this. It looks like some kind of jewelry.
1600819091.korean: 너 이거 가져. 무슨 장신구 같은데.

1600819092.english: ...Didn't you say you liked gold? You're not the boss right now, are you? You're a ghost, right?
1600819092.korean: ...황금 좋아한다 하지 않았어요? 지금 대장 아니죠? 귀신이죠?

1600819093.english: Think of it as a free gift for a subordinate. It's pure gold, but I gave it to you specially. Got it?
1600819093.korean: 부하한테 주는 사은품이다~ 생각하라고. 순금이지만 너한테 특별히 준 거야. 알았어?

1600819094.english: You should call it a gift... Captain.

1600819095.english: ...It's just plating, so why are you acting like you're doing me a favor?

1600819096.english: Sterling, what did you talk about with Fafnir?

1600819098.english: Hey, Sterling, your nose's all red. You're not crying, are you?
1600819098.korean: 에이~ 스털링 코 빨개졌는데? 설마 우는 거야?

1600819099.english: It didn't turn red. And I didn't cry.

1600819100.english: You used to tease me all the time calling me a fool, but you've grown fond of Fafnir, haven't you? You're such a total tsundere...
1600819100.korean: 바보라고 맨날 놀리더니, 파프니르한테 정 생겨서 그렇지? 이거 완전 츤데레…

1600819102.english: I guess I… caught the stupidity disease from Fafnir too.
1600819102.korean: 파프니르한테서 나도… 바보 병이 옮았나 보네.

1600819105.english: So you're saying the technology can be reproduced almost perfectly? Is mass production… impossible?
1600819105.korean: 기술은 거의 완벽하게 재현할 수 있단 거지? 양산은… 불가능한가?

1600819107.english: How's the estimated redesign time, Fortune?

1600819108.english: Okay, I'll leave it to you.

1600819111.english: You guys are closer to special forces... you aren't transport specialists.
1600819111.korean: 너흰 특작부대에 가깝지… 수송 전문은 아니잖아.

1600819115.english: I look forward to seeing you play a big role in Doom Bringer.

1600820001.english: I am Sterling, transferred to the position of Doom Bringer as of today. Please welcome me with applause.
1600820001.korean: 오늘 부로 둠 브링어로 인사이동이 된 스털링입니다. 박수로 맞이해주세요.

1600820002.english: Nice to meet you all, and I look forward to working with you.

1600820004.english: Huh? Where do you mean it's big?

1600820005.english: Of course, you must be talking about 'that side'. Sylphid.

1600820006.english: … Haha. Th-that… I guess it would be better to be a bit agile like the Doom Bringers, right? The Orca food is delicious, so I ate a lot… I wonder if I should lose some weight.
1600820006.korean: …하하. 그, 그게… 역시 둠 브링어 분들처럼 좀 날렵한 게 좋겠죠?&n오르카 밥이 맛있어서 많이 먹는 바람에… 체중 감량을 좀 하는게 좋으려나.

1600820007.english: If it's for airship operations rather than on-site bombing, weight probably wouldn't matter much.
1600820007.korean: 현장 폭격이 아닌 비행선 운용 쪽이라면 굳이 체중은 상관이 없을 듯해요.

1600820008.korean: 다들 여기 있었어? 흐음~ 환영해, 스털링.

1600820009.english: Yes, I’ve heard a lot about Captain Mei’s reputation.
1600820009.korean: 네, 메이 대장님의 명성은 많이 들었어요.

1600820010.english: I told everyone to get along well.

1600820011.english: Honestly… it would be a lie to say I wasn’t worried about whether my physique would suit the Doom Bringers, but I am truly grateful for the warm welcome.
1600820011.korean: 솔직히… 둠 브링어 분들한테 제가 과연 어울리는 체형일까 고민이 되지 않았다면 거짓말이겠지만, 이렇게 환영해 주신다니 정말 감사합니다.

1600820012.english: … What is a suitable body type?

1600820013.english: … I thought it was just slender people like Night Angel gathered here. I’ve been getting PT from Mighty lately just in case I ever need to wear flight gear…
1600820013.korean: …저는 나이트 앤젤 님처럼 슬랜더한 분들만 모여 계신 줄 알았거든요.&n혹시라도 비행 장비를 착용할 일이 올까 해서, 요즘 마이티 씨한테 P.T 받는 중이었는데…

1600820014.english: It's okay! I fly around just fine, too!

1600820015.english: … Didn't I tell you to lose weight yesterday as well?

1600820016.english: Hmph... You didn't say a word to Strato Angel...
1600820016.korean: 히잉… 스트라토 엔젤 님한텐 아무런 말씀도 안 하셨으면서…

1600820017.english: While I'm at it, I hope Strato Angel goes on a diet again.
1600820017.korean: 내친 김에 스트라토 엔젤도 다시 다이어트를 했으면 좋겠습니다.

1600820018.english: Ah, I plan to take it out myself. Don't worry!
1600820018.korean: 아, 알아서 뺄 생각이에요. 걱정하지 마세요!

1600820019.korean: 나이트 앤젤… 직장 내 괴롭힘은 안 돼요.

1600820020.english: That's right. What can I do? Orca's food is delicious.
1600820020.korean: 맞아요. 오르카의 음식들이 맛있는 걸 어떡해요.

1600820021.english: I've also been eating a lot lately because it's really delicious...
1600820021.korean: 저도 요새… 정말 맛있어서 많이 먹다 보니…

1600820022.english: While we're at it, Mr. Sterling, would you like to drop by the gourmet gathering? We'll be able to sample Ms. Sowan's special Schweinshaxe this week...
1600820022.korean: 이참에 스털링 씨도 미식회에 한 번 놀러 오시겠어요?&n이번 주는 소완 씨의 특제 슈바인스학세를 시식해 볼 수 있을 텐데…

1600820023.english: I think Mr. Mighty is going to scold me... Haha...
1600820023.korean: 마이티 씨가 혼내실 것 같은데… 하하…

1600820024.english: Don't worry. Just exercise to lose the weight you ate.
1600820024.korean: 걱정마라. 먹은 만큼 운동을 해서 빼면 그만이다.

1600820025.english: Wow… Mr. Lace, you look really solid. I'm jealous…
1600820025.korean: 우와… 레이스 씨는 진짜 몸이 단단해 보이시네요. 부럽다…

1600820028.english: Lace is wearing an optical camouflage suit with concealment capabilities.
1600820028.korean: 레이스는 은폐 기능이 있는 광학미채 슈트를 두르고 있어요.

1600820029.english: Well, anyway, the introductions are over... How about it, Sterling?
1600820029.korean: 자, 어쨌든 대원들 소개는 끝났고… 어때 스털링?

1600820030.english: It is certainly more organized than when I was in Fafnir.
1600820030.korean: 확실히, 예전에 제가 몸담았던 파프니르 때 보단 조직적이네요.

1600820031.english: It’s called the military, but actually, it’s nothing special. You just have to do your assigned work hard.
1600820031.korean: 말만 군대이지, 사실 별 건 없어. 맡은 일만 열심히 하면 돼.

1600820032.english: I look forward to working with you. Sterling.

1600820033.english: Anyway, considering how worried I was, it's going better than I thought.
1600820033.korean: 그나저나, 걱정됐던 것치곤 생각보다 잘 넘어가네?

1600820034.english: What are you worried about, Captain?

1600820035.english: I was worried that the adjutant might show hostility after seeing Sterling's physique.
1600820035.korean: 난 혹시나 스털링 몸매를 보고 부관이 텃세를 놓지 않을까 염려했는데.

1600820036.english: Do you think I would do that? I'm not a one or two-year-old child.
1600820036.korean: 제가 한 두 살 먹은 어린 애도 아니고 그러겠습니까?

1600820037.english: Come to think of it. The adjutant must have found stability now that he has a friend he can relate to.
1600820037.korean: 하긴. 부관도 이제 공감대를 형성할 수 있는 친구가 생겨서 안정을 찾았을 거야.

1600820038.english: Ah, that... the manager of Oughigia...

1600820039.english: Why is that story coming up there?

1600820040.english: I didn't mean to be sarcastic, Deputy. I'm just saying it because I like how bright your expression looks compared to before.
1600820040.korean: 비꼬려고 말한 건 아냐 부관. 난 그저 예전보다 밝아진 부관 표정이 좋아 보여 말하는 건데?

1600820042.english: Thanks to the Captain, things have gotten brighter than before. I used to get so frustrated every time I saw her on the verge of tears because she couldn't even go on a date with the Commander.
1600820042.korean: 대장 덕분에 예전보단 밝아지긴 했죠. &n사령관과 데이트 한 번 못해서 울먹거리는 모습을 볼 때마다 울화통이 터졌거든요.

1600820043.english: What? A date…? I heard rumors that Captain May has the Commander under her thumb every night.
1600820043.korean: 네? 데이트… 요? 메이 대장님께선 사령관을 밤마다 휘어잡는단 소문을 들었는데.

1600820044.english: Ha... You mean to take control? It reminds me of the time when I couldn't even properly utilize that lewd lump of fat, just stammering, sniffling, and drinking.
1600820044.korean: 하… 휘어 잡는다고요? 그 음탕한 지방덩어리를 제대로 활용도 못하고 &n어버버거리다 훌쩍거리며 술만 마시던 때가 떠오르군요.

1600820046.english: Even though he is the leader, it felt like I was raising a younger sibling... It makes me feel really good to see him grow like this.
1600820046.korean: 대장이지만 어린 동생 하나 키우는 느낌이었는데… 이렇게 성장하신 모습에 기분이 참 좋습니다.

1600820047.english: M-Did you say that, Lieutenant?! What do you mean by a younger brother!
1600820047.korean: 마, 말 다했어 부관?! 어린 동생이라니 그게 무슨 말이야!

1600820048.english: Huh? Wait a minute... Why are you suddenly... each other

1600820049.english: I understand. Even small peppers can be quite spicy, can't they?
1600820049.korean: 이해하겠습니다. 작은 고추도 꽤 매운 법이지 않습니까?

1600820050.english: Huh? Lieutenant. Aren't you the one who's small? No, wait. You must be a small raisin.
1600820050.korean: 하? 부관. 너야말로 작은 고추 아닌가? 아니지. 작은 건포도겠지.

1600820051.english: A new recruit has arrived, so are you suggesting we start a war of revelations? Your virtue is as small as your height.
1600820051.korean: 신입도 왔는데 폭로전이라도 하잔 말씀입니까? &n그 키만큼이나 덕이 작으시군요.

1600820052.english: Fine. I’ll make sure to clearly show you that your speed is as pathetic as the size of your chest.
1600820052.korean: 좋아. 그 가슴 크기 만큼 부관의 속도 졸렬하다는 걸 똑똑히 알려주도록 하지.

1600820053.english: Ha, Sterling. Between Captain May and me, who looks smaller? I mean our overall physiques.
1600820053.korean: 하, 스털링. 메이 대장과 저 중에 누가 더 작아보이시죠? 전체적인 체형 말입니다.

1600820054.english: Answer whatever comes to mind. I'll cover for the lieutenant's grudges.
1600820054.korean: 마음 가는대로 대답해 봐. 부관의 뒤끝은 내가 커버해줄 테니까.

1600820056.english: It's an annual event, Sterling. Just let it be.
1600820056.korean: 연례 행사에요 스털링. 그냥 그러려니 하세요.

1600820058.english: I look forward to working with you, Mr. Sterling.

1600820059.english: *Mumble mumble*... Nice to meet you, Mr. Sterling!

1600820060.english: I'm counting on you, super cool tomboy sister!
1600820060.korean: 잘 부탁한다고요, 초 멋진 톰보이 언니!

1600820061.english: I really look forward to working with you all... huh?

1600820062.english: (If you aren't busy, I'll teach you how to build abs -AL Race-)
1600820062.korean: (바쁘지 않다면 복근을 만드는 법을 가르쳐 주겠다 -AL 레이스-)

1600820063.english: … Haha, yes, I look forward to working with you.

1600821001.english: Are the blueprints for Haka Unit 2 really complete?

1600821002.english: Our technical team worked really hard on this, so I'd like to ask for your feedback.
1600821002.korean: 우리 기술부원들이 열심히 매달려서 만든 건데 어떤지 평가 좀 부탁하거든?

1600821003.english: Six combined fusion reactors... Of course, since they are installed as backups, it is sufficient even without as many as eight like before, but...
1600821003.korean: 복합핵융합로가 6개라… 물론 보조로 달아둔 거라 예전처럼 8개 씩이나 없어도 충분 하지만…

1600821004.english: That's a good point, Sterling. I anticipated that, so I had a special auxiliary power source in place.
1600821004.korean: 좋은 지적이에요 스털링 님. 그럴 줄 알고 특별한 보조 동력원을 구상해 놓았죠.

1600821006.english: We designed a system using Fafnir's power as an auxiliary generator to maintain an operating rate of at least 50% even in the event of damage to the fusion reactor.
1600821006.korean: 파프니르 님의 전력을 이용한 보조 발전기로, 핵융합로 파손 시에도&n최소 50% 이상의 가동률을 유지할 수 있도록 시스템을 구상해놓았죠.

1600821007.english: … Now there is no reason for Fafnir to ride the Haka.

1600821008.english: Instead of doing that, why don't you try giving him a ride? You could certainly utilize Fafnir as a sufficient auxiliary power source.
1600821008.korean: 그러지 말고 태워보는 건 어떤가요? 파프니르 님을 보조 동력원으로 충분히 활용할 수 있을 텐데요.

1600821009.english: I told you I'm not riding it. No matter how stupid Fafnir is, using Haka as a backup battery is non-human... no, non-bioroid. And what is this?
1600821009.korean: 글쎄 안 탄다니까요. 아무리 파프니르가 바보여도 하카의 보조 배터리로 쓰는 건 &n비인간… 아니, 비바이오로이드적이잖아요. 그리고 이건 뭐죠?

1600821010.english: It's the self-destruct device Azaz asked me to make.

1600821011.english: What did you say...? Is there a reason to install a self-destruct device?
1600821011.korean: 뭐라고요…? 자폭 장치를 달 이유가 있어요?

1600821012.english: Let me explain. A situation where you would self-destruct the Haka would be a very critical situation where the Haka is in danger of falling into enemy hands, or has already fallen.
1600821012.korean: 제가 설명하죠. 하카를 자폭시킬 상황이란 건, 적에게 하카가 넘어갈 위기에 처했거나 혹은 이미 넘어간 아주 위급한 상황이겠죠.

1600821013.english: I mean, then you can just destroy it by crashing into it... Is there really no need to go out of your way to make a self-destruct device?
1600821013.korean: 아니 그러면 충돌시켜 파괴하면 되지… 굳이 자폭 장치를 만들 필요까진 없지 않나요?

1600821014.english: Rather than crashing unstylishly, burning up under your own power with spectacular flames, and walking forward steadfastly and 멋있게 with that as a backdrop, as if you have no lingering regrets—isn't that exactly the Chief Engineer's unspoken dream?
1600821014.korean: 이왕 멋없이 충돌하는 것보단, 화려한 불꽃과 함께 자력으로 타오르고, &n그걸 배경으로 미련은 없는 것처럼 꿋꿋하고 멋있게 걸어나가는 것이야말로 기관장의 말 못 할 로망이잖아요.

1600821015.english: … Why are you specifically thinking of making them self-destruct first?
1600821015.korean: …왜 굳이 자폭시키는 걸 먼저 생각하고 계시죠?

1600821016.english: Now that the Haka has been successfully restored, isn't there no reason not to include a self-destruct function?
1600821016.korean: 하카 복원에 성공한 지금, 자폭 기능을 넣지 말아야 할 이유는 없지 않나요?

1600821017.english: On top of that… the self-destruct device is connected to the composite fusion reactor…?
1600821017.korean: 게다가… 자폭 장치가 복합핵융합로에 연결이 돼있네요…?

1600821018.english: Rather than making a separate self-destruct device... it's better to just connect the nuclear fusion reactor. It's less of a hassle to build... and the destructive power will be much greater.
1600821018.korean: 자폭 장치를 따로 만들기보단... 핵 융합로를 연결시켜버리는 게 낫잖아. &n만들 때 덜 귀찮고… 파괴력도 훨씬 셀 거야.

1600821019.english: That was a good idea, Scarabia. You could say it is a magnificent, hakka-style finish.
1600821019.korean: 좋은 아이디어였어요. 스카라비아 님. 하카다운 웅장한 마무리라고 할 수 있죠.

1600821021.english: Sterling, trust Orca's technology. By the way... you need to know the most important thing, okay? This is a high-tech device we invented, called 'LAKA'!
1600821021.korean: 스털링 동생, 오르카의 기술력을 믿어 봐. &n그나저나… 가장 중요한 걸 알아야 하거든?  이건 우리들이 발명한 첨단 기기, 일명 'L.A.K.A'라는 거거든!

1600821022.english: Laka…? Isn’t it just an ordinary smartwatch?

1600821023.english: Because of the Oguigia incident, I came to think that we couldn't just ignore the possibility of Iron Worms capable of detecting even cloaking fields. Since the Haka itself could be a major target, I also added an unmanned driving function for potential danger zones.
1600821023.korean: 언니는 오귀기아 일 때문에 은폐장도 충분히 탐지하는 철충의 가능성을 이대로 무시할 수는 없다고 생각하게 됐거든?&n하카 자체가 큰 표적이 될 수 있는 만큼, 혹시나 모를 위험지역의 무인 운전 기능도 추가해 놨거든.

1600821024.english: Driverless operation... The engine room is exposed to the outside, so it would be dangerous if targeted... That's nice. Of course, it would be best if the concealment remained hidden so as not to become a target, though...
1600821024.korean: 무인운전이라… 기관실 쪽이 밖으로 노출되어 있어서, 노려지면 위험한데... 좋네요.&n물론 표적이 되지 않도록 은신이 노출되지 않는 게 베스트이지만...

1600821025.english: This was Azaz's idea, and since it seemed like a better feature than expected, Gremlin and I put quite a bit of effort into it, you know?
1600821025.korean: 이건 아자즈 님 의견이었는데, 생각보다 괜찮은 기능 같아서 그렘린이랑 이 언니가 공 좀 들였거든?

1600821026.english: Holding the steering wheel with your own hands is nice, but... this aspect isn't bad either.
1600821026.korean: 직접 손으로 타륜을 잡는 것도 좋지만… 이런 부분도 나쁘지 않네요.

1600821027.english: Unfortunately, redesigning it to 100% perfect specifications was nearly impossible. However, it will function perfectly for transport purposes, as an air hub, and for fire support and refueling.
1600821027.korean: 100% 완벽한 스펙으로 재설계하는 건 아쉽지만 불가능에 가까웠어요.&n하지만 수송 목적이나, 항공 허브, 화력 지원과 급유 면에 있어선 완벽하게 재기능을 할 거예요.

1600821028.english: … I’m also planning to build a drone that can self-repair most damage. After all, it’s a hassle to repair this giant airship whenever I have a spare moment…
1600821028.korean: …웬만한 손상은 자가 수복해주는 드론도 같이 만들 계획이야.&n이 거대한 비행선을 틈날 때마다 수리해주는 것도 귀찮으니까…

1600821030.english: Huh? Mr. Sterling… why are you suddenly so quiet?
1600821030.korean: 응? 스털링 씨… 갑자기 왜 아무 말이 없으세요?

1600821032.english: Could it be... that it's because the performance is slightly lower than the 1st generation Haka?
1600821032.korean: 혹시… 1세대 하카보다 다소 성능이 낮아서 그러신 건가요?

1600821033.english: No... I'm just saying this because I'm grateful.

1600821034.english: I know better than anyone because I've driven a Haka. She was really… amazing. You probably won't be able to make one with the exact same specs.
1600821034.korean: 제가 하카를 운전해봐서 누구보다도 잘 알아요. 그녀는 정말… 대단했죠.&n그것과 똑같은 스펙으론 만들 수 없을 거예요.

1600821035.english: If I can soar like before and fulfill the role given to me... that is enough.
1600821035.korean: 예전처럼 날아오를 수 있고, 제게 주어진 역할을 수행할 수 있다면... 그걸로 족해요.

1600821037.english: About this blueprint... could you show it to me again? It's not perfect, but I want to be of as much help to you as I can within my knowledge.
1600821037.korean: 이 설계도 말이죠… 저한테 다시 보여주실래요? 미숙하지만 제가 아는 선에선 최대한 여러분께 도움이 되고 싶어요.

1600821038.english: Alright! Little Sterling~ This older sister is fired up for the first time in a while... I'm going to show you that Orca's technology is just as good as Black River's, you know?!
1600821038.korean: 좋아! 스털링 동생~ 이 언니도 간만에 불타오르네...&n오르카 기술력이 블랙리버 만큼 뛰어나다는 걸 보여 줄 거거든?!

1600821039.english: Okay, let's try making it properly this time.
1600821039.korean: 좋아요, 이번엔 제대로 한 번 만들어 보도록 하죠.

1600821041.english: Who knows? If it turns out well, maybe the Commander will give us a vacation?
1600821041.korean: 혹시 몰라요? 잘만 만들어지면 사령관님께서 휴가라도 주실지?

1600821043.english: Sisters, how is the Haka redesign going?

1600821045.english: I'm so busy with a mountain of work to take care of right now... so I can't join in... Sorry, unnie... Hehe... Anyway, are the Black River parts I fixed working well?
1600821045.korean: 당장 신경 써야 할 업무가 태산이라 바빠서… 같이 참여는 못 하고 있네… 미안 언니… 헤헤…&n그나저나, 내가 수리했던 블랙리버 부품들은 잘 돌아가?

1600821046.english: Yeah. That's a relief. Thanks to you, we were able to recreate most of the performances Haka had done. And I'm sure the Commander won't be disappointed at all.
1600821046.korean: 응. 다행이야. 덕분에 하카가 했던 대부분의 퍼포먼스를 되살릴 수 있었어.&n사령관님께서도 절대로 실망하지 않으실 거라고.

1600821047.english: But... maybe because the budget is a bit high... I'm worried about this and that. I'm also concerned about what to do if the performance doesn't meet the Commander's standards...
1600821047.korean: 근데… 예산이 좀 많이 들어가서 그런가… 이래저래 걱정이 되네.&n혹시라도 사령관님 눈높이에 맞지 않은 성능을 내면 어떡하나 걱정도 되고…

1600821048.english: If mass production is impossible… then there would naturally be many more things to consider, right? Like increasing the size of the ballast room… or choosing to reduce the passenger cabin and increase cargo capacity…
1600821048.korean: 양산이 불가능하다면… 역시 여러 가지로 더 고려 해야 할 것들이 많겠지?&n밸러스트룸 크기를 더 키운다거나… 객실을 줄이고 적재량을 늘리는 선택을 한다거나…

1600821049.english: Sister, why do you think your brother told you to make the Haka again?
1600821049.korean: 언니, 언니는 오빠가 왜 하카를 다시 만들라고 한 것 같아?

1600821050.english: Huh? Well… wouldn't they obviously have rebuilt the Haka to allow the Orca Resistance to be effectively deployed in Operation &n?
1600821050.korean: 응? 그거야… 당연히 오르카 저항군이 효과적으로 &n작전에 투입될 수 있게끔 하려고 하카를 재건한 게 아닐까?

1600821051.english: Come on~ We've been winning just fine so far with only command skills, without an airship like that! Do you really not understand why I went out of my way to invest the budget to build it?
1600821051.korean: 에이~ 그런 비행선 없이 지휘 능력만으로도 여태껏 잘만 승리했어!&n굳이 오빠가 예산을 투입해서 만든 이유를 정말 모르겠어?

1600821052.english: You know they say that when the first Haka was built at Black River, it involved advanced technology and a massive budget. Even if they have stockpiled a huge amount of supplies, do you really not have any idea why they went out of their way to proceed with a project that might actually be detrimental in a wartime situation like this?
1600821052.korean: 초대 하카도 블랙리버에서 만들어질 때 진보적인 기술력과 엄청난 예산이 들어갔다고 하잖아.&n아무리 많은 물자를 저장해놓았다고 해도 이런 전시 상황에 독이 될지 모를 프로젝트를 굳이 진행한 이유에 대해서 정말 짚이는 게 없어?

1600821054.english: We owe a debt to the first Haka and my older sister. If it weren't for that, we would never have been able to defeat the Iron Worms.
1600821054.korean: 우린 초대 하카랑 언니한테 빚을 졌잖아.&n그게 아니었다면, 우린 철충한테 절대로 이기지 못했을 거야.

1600821055.english: If only to repay the debt he owed to my sisters and Haka... my brother wanted to make Haka again. He even promised to make it himself, and he complained to my sisters that he couldn't put it off any longer.
1600821055.korean: 언니랑 하카한테 진 빚을 갚기 위해서라도… 오빠는 하카를 다시 만들어 주고 싶어 했어.&n오빠가 직접 만들어준다고 약속까지 했는데, 더는 미룰 수 없다고 언니들한테 하소연했거든.

1600821056.english: You really are redesigning it for that reason… because of the promise made back then?
1600821056.korean: 굳이, 그런 이유로… 재설계를 한다고? 그때 했던 약속 때문에?

1600821057.english: It looks like Sterling still doesn't know Oppa~ Isn't it time you got used to him? Oppa always thinks of our Orca's happiness first!
1600821057.korean: 스털링 언니는 아직도 오빠를 모르나 보네~ 이젠 적응할 때도 되지 않았어?&n오빠는 늘 우리 오르카의 행복을 먼저 생각하잖아!

1600821058.english: If that was really the reason… even if it takes time, make it more perfect…
1600821058.korean: 정말 그런 이유였다면… 시간이 들더라도 더 완벽하게…

1600821059.english: Of course, it would be best to restore it perfectly. That is something we can fill in gradually through upgrades.
1600821059.korean: 물론 완벽하게 복원하는 게 좋겠지. &n그거야 차차 업그레이드를 통해 채워나가면 될 일이고~

1600821060.english: Could it be that my brother actually wants to see my sister become the Haka's chief engineer again and play an active role?
1600821060.korean: 오빠는 사실 언니가 다시 하카의 기관장이 되어 활약하는 모습이 보고 싶은 게 아닐까?

1600821062.english: My little doctor isn't wrong about a single thing, you know? And with all of us sticking close like this, there's no way the Commander would be disappointed, you know?
1600821062.korean: 우리 닥터 동생 말 틀린 거 하나 없거든? &n그리고 우리들 모두가 이렇게 달라붙었는데 사령관이 실망할 리도 없거든?

1600821064.english: … Ahaha, I guess I acted a bit awkward for no reason. I thought the former Commander promised the redesign simply because he wanted to deploy the Haka strategically...
1600821064.korean: …아하하, 괜히, 제가 멋쩍게 군 것 같네요. &n전 사령관님이 그저, 하카를 전략적으로 투입하고 싶어 재설계를 약속하신 거라 생각했는데...

1600821065.english: If Sterling's younger brother says that, I think the Commander might be a bit disappointed. Even when the redesign was first brought up, he strongly emphasized that Sterling absolutely had to participate.
1600821065.korean: 스털링 동생이 그렇게 말하면, 사령관 좀 섭섭해할 것 같거든?&n처음 재설계 말을 꺼냈을 때도 스털링이 꼭 참여하는 방향으로 가야 한다 신신당부했거든?

1600821066.english: By the way, the blueprints you're refining looked amazing... By any chance, would you be interested in joining me to gain a broader understanding and explore aerospace engineering, using the knowledge you have?
1600821066.korean: 그나저나 언니가 보완 중인 설계도 보니까 대단하던데…&n혹시, 가지고 있는 지식을 바탕으로 우주항공 공학에 대한 더 폭넓은 이해와 탐구를 나와 함께 해볼 생각은 없어?

1600821067.english: I was actually in need of people to help with my research these days!
1600821067.korean: 안 그래도 요즘 연구를 도와줄 인원이 필요했는데!

1600821069.english: Oh my, look, it looks like Sterling's younger brother's friends have come to visit.
1600821069.korean: 어머, 저기 스털링 동생 친구들이 찾아온 것 같거든?

1600821070.english: I was wondering what you've been up to lately since you haven't been hanging out with us... so you were doing something like this?
1600821070.korean: 요새 우리랑 놀지도 않고 뭐하나 봤는데… 이런 거 하고 있던 거야?

1600821072.english: Didn't Fafnir buy him food and ask him to help Sterling?
1600821072.korean: 파프니르가 먹을 거 사주면서 스털링 도와달라 하던데?

1600821073.english: We've tried moving the Haka with Sterling too, so we can help somehow!
1600821073.korean: 우리도 스털링이랑 같이 하카를 움직여 봤으니까 어떻게든 도와줄 수 있다고!

1600821074.english: It’s not that we don’t miss the Haka, Sterling.
1600821074.korean: 우리라고 하카를 그리워하지 않는 건 아니야, 스털링.

1600821076.english: Everyone is working so hard to see Sterling's little brother fly again, you know?
1600821076.korean: 스털링 동생이 다시 하늘을 나는 모습을 보려고 이렇게 모두들 노력하고 있거든?

1600821077.english: I thought you guys were mindless...
1600821077.korean: 너희들 아무 생각 없는 줄 알았더니…

1600821078.english: Don't treat us like we're on the same level as Fafnir!

1600821079.english: Seriously, why are you doing this? It's making me cry!

1600821080.english: What are you talking about when you're already crying!

1600821083.english: … You guys would better be prepared. I'm going to make you work hard without any breaks!
1600821083.korean: …너희들 각오하는 게 좋을 거야. 쉬는 시간 없이 빡세게 일 시킬 거니까!

1600822001.english: After finishing work, I stopped by the hangar to check on Haka's progress.
1600822001.korean: - 업무를 끝내고 난 뒤, 하카의 진행 상황이 궁금해 격납고에 들렸다.

1600822002.english: Even though it was time for everyone to sleep, the hangar was brightly lit, and Sterling could be seen meticulously checking something.
1600822002.korean: - 모두가 잘 시간임에도 불구하고, 격납고 안은 환한 조명이 켜져 있었고, &n스털링이 꼼꼼히 무언가를 체크하고 있는 게 보였다.

1600822004.english: Just a few days ago, I stayed up all night and saw that dark circles had settled deep under my eyes...
1600822004.korean: - 요 며칠 전에도 밤을 새워서 다크서클이 진하게 내려앉은 걸 봤었는데…

1600822005.english: My heart was pounding... so I couldn't fall asleep.

1600822006.english: Then again, considering he was the one who must have been happiest than anyone else at the news of the Haka's restoration, perhaps it is only natural...
1600822006.korean: - 하긴, 그 누구보다 하카를 복원하는 소식에 제일 기뻤을 당사자이니 어쩌면 당연한 모습일지도…

1600822007.english: Uh, well... I've practically been living in the hangar... so I'll go wash up.
1600822007.korean: 그, 그게... 격납고에서 살다시피 해서… 씻고 오겠습니다.

1600822009.english: Commander, have I perhaps mentioned this to you?
1600822009.korean: 사령관님, 혹시 제가 말씀드린 적 있나요?

1600822010.english: Back when humans were still around, I watched right beside the scene as the first Haka was completed.
1600822010.korean: 전 인간님들이 계셨을 당시에, 초대 하카가 완성되는 모습을 바로 옆에서 지켜봤었다고요.

1600822011.english: Maybe it's because I saw the Director and the researchers pouring their hearts and souls into the production... but it feels very moving. I wish I could have burned it for you in person.
1600822011.korean: 연구소장님과 연구원분들이 기를 쓰고 영혼을 불살라 제작에 매달리는 걸 봐서 그런 지… 감회가 새로워요.&n…직접 태워드릴 수 있었더라면 좋았을 텐데.

1600822012.english: I recalled the first time I met Sterling, when he shrugged his shoulders and proudly explained Haka's abilities. In this respect, I also thought he was somewhat similar to Fafnir...
1600822012.korean: - 스털링을 처음 만났을 때, 어깨를 으쓱거리며 하카의 능력을 뿌듯하게 설명하던 때가 떠올랐다.&n이런 면에선 파프니르와 어느 정도 닮은 것 같단 생각도 들었는데…

1600822013.english: Huh? Ah... hahaha... well... I mean...

1600822014.english: It's good that I joined Orca. But…

1600822015.english: The best thing is that I have something to do inside the Orca.
1600822015.korean: 제가 오르카 안에서 할 일이 생겼다는 게 제일 좋아요.

1600822016.english: It seems Fafnir has played a significant role so far... and I've often felt a deep sense of regret, wondering what it would have been like if Haka had also played a proper role at least once in the operations the Commander has planned.
1600822016.korean: 그간 파프니르도 크게 한 건 활약한 모양이고… 여태 사령관님이 계획한 작전에서 하카도 한 번쯤 제대로 활약했었더라면 어땠을까 하고… &n내심 아쉬운 적이 많았거든요.

1600822017.english: Sterling scratched his head with an awkward expression. I patted Sterling on the shoulder at his tone, which sounded as if he hadn't had much work to do at Orca.
1600822017.korean: - 스털링은 멋쩍은 표정으로 머리를 긁적거렸다.&n마치 자신이 오르카에서 맡은 일이 많이 없었다는 듯한 말투에 나는 스털링의 어깨를 툭툭 쳤다.

1600822018.english: What? What do you mean, Commander? I… I was just a bioroid originally designed to pilot the Haka…
1600822018.korean: 네? 그게 무슨 말씀이세요 사령관님?&n전… 원래부터 하카를 몰기 위해 설계된 바이오로이드였을 뿐인데…

1600822020.english: What do you mean... that's embarrassing...

1600822022.english: Haha... ha... Is, is that so?

1600822023.english: Captain May treats me really well. And Night Angel too…
1600822023.korean: 메이 대장님께서 정말 잘 대해주세요. 그리고 나이트 앤젤 님도…

1600822024.english: It is a relief that Night Angel seems to clearly separate work and personal life.
1600822024.korean: - 나이트 앤젤이 그래도 공과 사는 확실히 구분하는 것 같아 다행이다.

1600822025.english: Should I say he's much more reliable than when he was hanging out with that idiot...
1600822025.korean: 그 바보랑 다녔을 때보단 훨씬 믿음직스럽다고 해야 하나…

1600822027.english: Still, very occasionally, I do miss the days when I hung out with that impulsive fool. After fighting Fafnir, I definitely thought a lot about how awful it was being with him and that we should never meet again.
1600822027.korean: 그래도 아주 가끔씩은, 그 즉흥적인 바보랑 다닐 때가 그립기도 하네요.&n파프니르랑 싸우고 나선 함께해서 더러웠고 다신 만나지 말자… 분명 그런 생각도 많이 했었는데.

1600822028.english: I think that would be difficult to handle in its own way...
1600822028.korean: 그건 그것대로 감당하기 힘들 것 같은데요…

1600822029.english: By the way, Commander. From what I’ve heard from others… is it really true that you’ve engaged in various eccentric behaviors?
1600822029.korean: 그나저나 사령관님. 다른 분들께 이야기를 듣기론… 여러 기행을 벌이셨다는 게 정말 사실이세요?

1600822030.english: Like the Orca Cooking Contest... or the Reverse Bunny Show... or being the Honorary President of the SM Club. And lately, they've been saying they'll give the AGS members a chance to date...
1600822030.korean: 오르카 요리 대회라던가… 역바니 쇼라던가… SM 클럽 명예 회장님이시라던가. &n요샌 AGS 분들께 연애의 기회를 드리겠다면서...

1600822032.english: I wonder if Sterling will mistake me for a womanizer… No, actually, maybe the word womanizer suits me much better now.
1600822032.korean: - 스털링이 날 난봉꾼으로 오해하진 않을까…&n아니, 어쩌면 이젠 내게 난봉꾼이란 말이 훨씬 어울리는 것 같기도 하다.

1600822033.english: You don't really need to hide it. After all, you are the last human. Even when I was traveling with Fafnir before joining, I went through a lot of bizarre things... so now I won't even be surprised by ordinary things.
1600822033.korean: 딱히 숨기지 않으셔도 됩니다. 어차피 마지막 인간님이시잖아요.&n합류 전, 파프니르랑 다닐 때도 기상천외한 일을 많이 겪어봐서… 이제 웬만한 일엔 놀라지도 않을 거예요.

1600822034.english: … But even if he pulled off all sorts of outrageous stunts like Fafnir, the Orca members followed him without complaint, didn't they?
1600822034.korean: …하지만 파프니르처럼, 온갖 기상천외한 일을 벌이셨다 한들, 오르카 분들은 군말 없이 잘 따랐잖아요.

1600822035.english: Since the Commander's affection for the bioroids is unwavering, I suppose that's why everyone acts that way, right?
1600822035.korean: 사령관님이 바이오로이드 분들을 아끼시는 마음은 한결 같으니까, 다들 그러신 거겠죠?

1600822036.english: I heard that the children under Fafnir and me were also transferred to the Haka crew.
1600822036.korean: 저랑 파프니르의 휘하에 있던 아이들도 하카 승조원으로 인사이동 시켜주셨다면서요.

1600822037.english: It was a decision made with the thought that since the children had ridden a haka before, they would be able to work comfortably together even when driving the newly made haka.
1600822037.korean: - 하카를 한 번 타봤던 아이들인 만큼, &n새로 만든 하카를 몰게 되었을 때에도 함께 편히 일할 수 있지 않을까 싶어, 내린 결정이었다.

1600822038.english: The kids probably didn't show it all this time, but they must have wanted to ride the haka again more than anyone else.
1600822038.korean: 그동안 애들이 내색하지 않았겠지만, 분명 누구보다도 하카를 다시 타고 싶었을 거예요.

1600822039.english: I made a lot of fun memories while adventuring here and there with Haka.
1600822039.korean: 하카로 이곳저곳을 모험하면서 재밌는 추억들을 많이 만들었죠.

1600822040.english: Yes, I think so... Oh, but Commander?
1600822040.korean: 네, 아마 그럴 것 같아요… 아, 그런데 사령관님?

1600822041.english: By any chance… have you ever actually gone up to a high altitude?
1600822041.korean: 혹시… 높은 고도에 직접 올라가 보신 적은 있으신가요?

1600822042.english: At Sterling's unexpected question, I retraced my past memories. I had flown above the ground with the help of the team members, but I had never gone up to a high place.
1600822042.korean: - 스털링의 뜬금없는 질문에 나는 과거의 기억을 되짚었다.&n대원들의 도움으로 지면 위를 비행한 적은 있지만 높은 곳을 올라간 적은 없었다.

1600822044.korean: - 내가 고개를 끄덕거리자 스털링은 미소를 지었다.

1600822045.english: Then… Commander, if we end up holding the vacuum ceremony, would it be alright to postpone the time to the evening?
1600822045.korean: 그러면… 사령관님. 혹시, 진공식을 하게 되거든 시간대를 저녁으로 미뤄도 될까요?

1600822046.english: Commander... I would like to give you a gift as well.
1600822046.korean: 사령관님께… 저도 선물 하나를 드리고 싶어서요.

1600822047.english: I tilted my head at the sudden mention of a gift, but... I decided to accept Sterling's offer.
1600822047.korean: - 뜬금없이 선물이란 말에 고개가 갸웃해졌지만… 스털링의 제안을 받아들이기로 했다.

1600822049.english: Actually, it's strange that you're not sleeping.
1600822049.korean: 오히려 네가 안 자고 있는게 신기한데.

1600822052.english: No. Shall we walk a little, Sterling?

1600822054.english: I suppose if you can memorize Haka's specs by heart...
1600822054.korean: 하긴, 하카의 스펙을 달달 외울 정도면…

1600822055.english: I've never seen Sterling this happy.
1600822055.korean: 스털링이 이렇게 기뻐하는 걸 본 적이 없네.

1600822056.english: As far as I can remember, that is the brightest smile I’ve seen you with since you came to Orca.
1600822056.korean: 내 기억 상 오르카에 온 이후로 본 모습 중에 가장 밝게 웃는 얼굴을 하고 있는걸.

1600822057.english: I don't think Sterling exists solely for the Haka.
1600822057.korean: 난 꼭 스털링이 하카를 위해서만 존재한다고는 생각 안 해.

1600822060.english: We can remake the Haka, but...

1600822061.english: There is only one Sterling this passionate.

1600822062.english: It feels like things have gotten brighter since Orca came.

1600822063.english: Do you treat the Doom Bringer kids well?

1600822064.english: Should I switch you to Empressis Hound?

1600822067.english: I don't know anyone like that.

1600822072.english: Hmm... I've flown for a short while... but I've never been up to a high place.
1600822072.korean: 음… 잠깐 비행한 적은 있어도… 높은 곳을 올라간 적은 없지.

1600822073.english: Huh, why specifically in the evening?

1600823001.english: Finally, the Haka's vacuum ceremony took place in the hangar. After all the crew members who had served on the Haka had boarded, Stirling and I also finished boarding.
1600823001.korean: - 마침내, 격납고에선 하카의 진공식이 열렸다.&n그간 하카에서 근무했던 승조원들이 모두 탑승한 뒤, 나와 스털링도 탑승을 마쳤다.

1600823002.english: [c][00FF00][I've finished opening the hangar roof too, you know?][-][/c]

1600823003.english: [c][00FF00][The amount of energy flowing in the combined fusion reactor is also stable.][-][/c]

1600823004.english: [c][00FF00][… Everything is ready. Go ahead and depart.][-][/c]

1600823005.english: After receiving a call from the technical department, I headed toward May, who was holding a glass of champagne and looking triumphant.
1600823005.korean: - 기술부의 연락을 받은 뒤, 나는 샴페인을 든 채 의기양양한 표정을 짓고 있는 메이에게 향했다.

1600823006.english: [c][00FF00][Don't worry! Do you think I can't handle something like this properly?][-][/c]
1600823006.korean: [c][00FF00][걱정 말라고! 이런 거 하나 내가 제대로 못 하겠어?][-][/c]

1600823007.english: [c][00FF00][… Captain. You aren't throwing champagne in a strange place because you lack strength or are too short, are you?][-][/c]
1600823007.korean: [c][00FF00][…대장. 혹시 힘이 부족하거나 키가 너무 낮아서 &n이상한데 샴페인을 던지는 건 아니겠죠?][-][/c]

1600823008.english: [c][00FF00][It is said to be ominous if champagne is hit properly and does not break.][-][/c]
1600823008.korean: [c][00FF00][샴페인이 제대로 맞아 깨지지 않으면 불길하다고 합니다.][-][/c]

1600823009.english: [c][00FF00][Lieutenant! Why are you bringing up the Key there?! If all else fails, we can just fly to the Throne and clear it!][-][/c]
1600823009.korean: [c][00FF00][부관! 거기서 키 이야기가 왜 나오는데?! 정 안 되면 옥좌로 비행해서 깨도 된다고!][-][/c]

1600823011.english: [c][00FF00][Why don't you worry about your chest first, which looks even smaller since Sterling came in?!][-][/c]
1600823011.korean: [c][00FF00][스털링이 들어오고 나서 더 작아 보이는 네 가슴부터 걱정하지 그래?!][-][/c]

1600823012.english: Not long after, Sterling grabbed the steering wheel after confirming that the champagne bottle May had thrown with all her might had hit the Haka's tail fin.
1600823012.korean: - 얼마 지나지 않아, 메이가 힘껏 던진 샴페인 병이 하카의 꼬리 날개에 맞은 것을 확인한 스털링은 타륜을 움켜 잡았다.

1600823013.english: Switched to power sources for combined fusion reactors 1 through 4.

1600823014.english: What happened to the mooring rope?

1600823018.english: Good. Camouflage field activated. Thermal and electromagnetic stealth activated... Floating device Vector, switch to rudder...
1600823018.korean: 좋아. 은폐장 작동. 열, 전파 스텔스 작동… 부유장치 벡터, 방향타로 전환…

1600823019.english: Haka, surfacing. All crew members to position.

1600823020.english: With Sterling's resolute voice, which was rarely heard, the Haka rises above the night sky spread out over the massive hangar with its roof open.
1600823020.korean: - 평소에는 볼 수 없었던 스털링의 단호한 목소리와 함께 &n지붕이 열린 거대 격납고 위에 펼쳐진 밤 하늘 위로, 하카가 부상한다.

1600823021.english: Stirling's hand gripping the steering wheel trembled, and the crew members gazed excitedly at the receding ground. The haka, having ascended vertically in an instant, soon pierced the clouds and soared high.
1600823021.korean: - 타륜을 잡은 스털링의 손이 떨렸고, 승조원들도 들뜬 표정으로 멀어지는 지상을 바라보았다.&n순식간에 수직으로 상승한 하카는 어느새 구름을 뚫고 높이 상승한다.

1600823022.english: Commander, this is the night sky of Earth that I have always seen with Fafnir... You mentioned that you had never seen the sky from a high altitude, so I really wanted to show it to you.
1600823022.korean: 사령관님, 제가 파프니르랑 늘 봐왔던… 지구의 밤하늘입니다.&n높은 고도에서 보는 하늘은 본 적 없다고 하셔서, 꼭 사령관님께 보여드리고 싶었습니다.

1600823023.english: With Sterling's proud voice, I met the night sky outside the window with my own eyes.
1600823023.korean: - 스털링의 뿌듯한 목소리와 함께, 나는 유리창 밖의 밤하늘을 두 눈으로 마주했다.

1600823024.english: It was a unique landscape, completely different from when looking up at the night sky from the ground.
1600823024.korean: - 지상에서 밤하늘을 올려다 보았을 때와는 전혀 다른, 색다른 풍경이었다.

1600823025.english: Countless stars appeared and came out to greet Stirling. After taking his hands off the steering wheel, Stirling stood beside me, looked up at the sky, and spoke.
1600823025.korean: - 차마 손으로 헤아릴 수 없을 정도로 많은 별이 나와 스털링 앞을 마중나왔다.&n타륜에서 손을 뗀 후, 스털링은 내 옆에 선 뒤 하늘을 바라보며 말했다.

1600823026.english: … I really wanted to show this to the Commander.

1600823028.english: I wanted to invite the researchers who put their heads together when the Haka was first created to watch this scene with me.
1600823028.korean: 예전에 처음 하카가 만들어졌을 때, 같이 머리를 맞댔던 연구원 분들을 모시고 같이 이 장면을 보고 싶었어요.

1600823029.english: Sterling muttered in a calm tone. At first glance, the tears hanging at the corners of her eyes seemed to be filled with stars.
1600823029.korean: - 스털링은 담담한 어조로 중얼거렸다.&n얼핏, 그녀의 눈망울 끝에 매달린 눈물 속은 별이 가득 담긴 듯했다.

1600823030.english: So, if the Haka were to be remade… I wanted to look at the stars with the Commander, the last human.
1600823030.korean: 그래서, 하카가 다시 만들어진다면… 마지막 인간님이신 사령관님과 함께 별을 보고 싶었습니다.

1600823031.english: Sterling, completed reaching an altitude of 20km! Further ascent…
1600823031.korean: 스털링, 고도 20KM 진입 완료했어! 더 상승…

1600823032.english: You fool, in times like this, you should just step aside.
1600823032.korean: 바보야, 이럴 땐 그냥 자리 비키고 있는 거야.

1600823034.english: Shut your mouth. Is your level of perceptiveness on the level of Fafnir?
1600823034.korean: 입 다물고 있어. 너 눈치 수준 파프니르 급이야?

1600823035.english: … Who, who said I'm crying?! Stay suspended in your current position!
1600823035.korean: …누, 누가 운다고 그래?! 현재 위치에서 정지 체공해!

1600823036.english: As I gently patted Sterling's shoulder as she wiped her tears with the back of her hand, she leaned comfortably against my shoulder.
1600823036.korean: - 눈물을 손등으로 닦는 스털링의 어깨를 가볍게 다독이자, 그녀가 내 어깨에 편히 기대었다.

1600823037.english: … It seems like everyone in Orca loves you, Commander. I think I know why now.
1600823037.korean: …오르카의 모든 분들이 사령관님을 사랑하시는 것 같은데. 왜 그런지 이제 알 것 같습니다.

1600823038.english: Really… He grants any futile dream for the sake of the bioroids… How could anyone not like him?
1600823038.korean: 정말이지… 바이오로이드를 위해서라면 그 어떤 헛된 꿈이라도 다 들어주시는데… &n어떻게 좋아하지 않을 수 있겠어요.

1600823039.english: There was a reason why Fafnir wanted to help the Commander so much, even to the point of sacrificing Haka.
1600823039.korean: 파프니르가 그렇게나 하카를 희생하면서까지 사령관님을 돕고 싶어 했던 이유가 있었네요.

1600823040.english: Back then, I couldn't have hated that decision so much...
1600823040.korean: 그땐 그 결정이 그렇게도 미울 수가 없었는데…

1600823042.english: … I thought you said you would make the Haka again just to comfort me.
1600823042.korean: …하카를 다시 만들어주신다 하신 것도 절 위로하기 위해 그냥 하신 말씀인 줄로만 알았는데.

1600823044.english: Having spent time with the members of Orca, keeping the promises I made to them—no matter how trivial—even if it means risking everything I have is the least I can do to express my affection.
1600823044.korean: - 여태껏 오르카의 대원들과 지내며, 사소한 것들일지언정 그녀들에게 한 약속은&n내 모든 걸 걸더라도 꼭 지켜내는 것이야말로 내가 할 수 있는 최소한의 애정 표현이다.

1600823045.english: I did not want to lord over them or take their kindness lightly simply because I was the last human.
1600823045.korean: - 마지막 인간이라는 이유만으로 그들 위에 군림하거나 호의를 가볍게 여기고 싶지 않았다.

1600823046.english: … In a way, you are seriously kind, almost like a fool.
1600823046.korean: …정말이지 어떻게 보면 그 바보처럼 심각하게 착하시네요.

1600823047.english: Instead of answering my question, Sterling stared at me intently. After a faint arc formed on her starlit lips, her soft lips touched the corner of my mouth.
1600823047.korean: - 내 질문에 스털링은 대답 대신, 나를 물끄러미 바라보았다.&n별빛이 반짝이는 입술에 미약한 호가 그려진 뒤, 내 입가에는 폭신한 그녀의 입술이 닿았다.

1600823048.english: When Sterling finally opened his eyes, he smiled bravely despite his flushed face.
1600823048.korean: - 이윽고 눈을 뜨자, 스털링은 홍조가 띄면서도 애써 씩씩하게 미소를 지었다.

1600823049.english: That fool has a reckless side sometimes... and as a former subordinate, I thought it was something worth emulating. If the first gift was this beautiful night sky... please consider this right now as the second gift.
1600823049.korean: 그 바보한텐 가끔 저돌적인 면이 있는데… 전직 부하로서 본받아 볼 만한 점이라고 생각돼서요.&n첫 번째 선물이 이 아름다운 밤하늘이라면… 지금 이게 두 번째 선물이라고 생각하세요.

1600823050.english: … Seriously, what are we supposed to do if even the Commander is being so reckless?

1600823051.english: At my question, Sterling patted my shoulder as if dumbfounded. After gazing up at the night sky for quite a while, I lowered the airship.
1600823051.korean: - 내 질문에 스털링은 어이가 없다는 듯, 툭 어깨를 쳤다.&n그렇게 한참을, 밤하늘을 올려다보다 비행선을 하강시켰다.

1600823052.english: That night, after successfully completing the Haka's vacuum ceremony, the Orca members enjoyed a modest welcoming party. Not wanting to disturb their enjoyment, I quietly returned to the commander's office, and was just about to turn off the lights early for tomorrow's work when...
1600823052.korean: - 그날 밤, 무사히 하카의 진공식을 마친 후, 뒤이어 오르카 대원들은 조촐한 환영식을 즐겼다.&n나는 그들의 즐거운 시간을 방해하고 싶지 않아 조용히 사령관실로 돌아왔고 내일의 업무를 위해 일찍 불을 끄려는 순간이었다.

1600823053.english: I came to turn off the light.

1600823054.english: It was a very familiar voice, but the pungent smell of alcohol and the slightly dizzy tone made me chuckle.
1600823054.korean: - 너무 익숙한 목소리, 하지만 얼큰하게 느껴지는 술 냄새와 &n살짝 헤롱거리는 어투에 나는 피식 웃음이 나왔다.

1600823055.english: Sterling staggered, but slowly walked to the bed and lay down on top of me.
1600823055.korean: - 스털링은 비틀거리면서도, 천천히 침대까지 걸어와, 내 위에 누웠다.

1600823056.english: Well… I’m not sure. Did Fafnir do that, or… did Captain May?
1600823056.korean: 글쎄요… 잘 모르겠어요. 파프니르가 그랬나요, 아님… 메이 대장님께서 그러셨나요?

1600823057.english: At my answer, Sterling smiled but did not avert his gaze, continuing to exhale his alcohol-smelling breath close to my face.
1600823057.korean: - 내 대답에 스털링은 웃음을 지으면서도 마주 보는 눈길을 거두지 않으며 계속해서 술냄새가 나는 숨결을 얼굴 가까이 뱉었다.

1600823058.english: … I got permission to sleep with Captain May. Ms. Lilith let me in too… Hehe…
1600823058.korean: …메이 대장님께 동침권을 받았어요. 리리스 씨께서도 들여보내주셨고요… 헤헤…

1600823059.english: I heard… the Doom Bringer initiation ritual is spending the night with the Commander…
1600823059.korean: 듣기론… 둠 브링어 신입 신고식은 사령관님과 하룻밤을 같이 보내는 거라던데…

1600823060.english: … If you don't want to, it can't be helped. I was planning to give you a third gift.
1600823060.korean: …싫으시면 어쩔 수 없죠. 세 번째 선물을 드리려고 했는데.

1600823062.english: I might be being presumptuous, but... even if only to be compensated for all the sleepless nights I've worked...
1600823062.korean: 주제넘은 말 일지도 모르겠지만… 그간 제가 밤새워 일한 보상을 받기 위해서라도…

1600823063.english: Commander, you'll have to put in some effort.

1600823064.english: I heard that the Haka you have, Commander, is amazing. As the Chief Engineer, I don't think I can just move on without piloting it myself.
1600823064.korean: 사령관님께서 가지고 계신 하카도 대단하다고 들었는데. &n명색이 기관장인 저로서는 조종을 안 해보고는 넘어갈 수 없을 것 같네요.

1600823065.english: F*ck, let's give it a try.

1600823066.english: - Even if only to celebrate Sterling’s dream of soaring into the skies with humanity…
1600823066.korean: - 인간과 함께 창공으로 날아오르고자 했던 스털링의 꿈을 축하하기 위해서라도…

1600823067.english: I decided to hand over the steering wheel to a competent chief engineer, at least for tonight.
1600823067.korean: - 오늘 밤만큼은 유능한 기관장에게 내 타륜을 넘겨주기로 했다.

1600823071.english: No matter how you do it, I'd be grateful if you woke me up.
1600823071.korean: 뭐 어떻게 하던 간에 깨주면 고마워.

1600823077.english: Because I am the last human left to you.
